programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Ken tries to improve his relationship with Gypsy's dad. Gypsy has her baby shower. And unfounded online rumours of a breakup put strain on Gypsy and Ken. (S2 Ep6)

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Divorce bells are ringing, but Ryan messages Gypsy to tell her that he misses her, and she decides to meet him in person for the first time since she walked out on him. (S2 Ep7)

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Albie the Jack Russell has a second chance of a home with 10-year-old George. And a mistreated lurcher called Sam needs some home comforts. Will visitors see past his size? (S4 Ep5)

programme.title: Invasion of the Parakeets
programme.desc: Ring-necked parakeets are some of Britain's most divisive birds. Are they beautiful, charismatic newcomers, or an ecological menace to crops and native wildlife? Chris Packham investigates.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Fiat X1/9: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend rescue a Fiat X1/9. Its owner, Steve, who has terminal cancer, desperately wants to see his son drive it. (S9 Ep3)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: One Giant Pick for Mankind: Mike and Frank discover an ultra-rare piece of Space Age history in a former firefighter's stockpile. And Frank's plan goes up in smoke. (S15 Ep3)

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: Rob and Ade make waves at the Port of Goole. Kate sets to work on a dazzling new project. Experienced boater Gerry guides Stuart along the River Thames' tidal stretch. (S3 Ep12/20)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies searches around Villamartin in Spain with Amanda and Steve, who want to buy a holiday home where they can spend the winter months golfing, socialising and soaking up the sun.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Joanne and former bodybuilding champion Darren hope to find the perfect holiday home on Spain's eastern Costa del Sol. Can Jean Johansson find a strong enough contender for their £180k?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Andrew and Robyn love Greece and, now that they're retired, they can't wait to enjoy extended holidays on Crete. Craig Rowe shows them what their £250k can buy.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de Bourneau, Erin and JB desperately rush to complete their turret art room renovations. In the Dordogne, Nick and Nicole begin major work on their chateau. (S5 Ep2)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ryan and Steve want a holiday home in their favourite resort of Maspalomas on Gran Canaria, for the beaches, shopping and nightlife. Jean Johansson shows them what their £150k can buy.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Milton Keynes. The first host, Ray Dodd, finds his guests hard to please. With his starter rejected and a main returned, he's left sweating over his chances of winning the prize... (Ep1/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Milton Keynes. Michelle's black-tie evening doesn't go to plan, as her guests diss her food and call the main course 'poison'. Will her luck turn with the Monte Carlo entertainment? (Ep2/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Milton Keynes. Joke-loving Stuart offers his guests a flavour of the Serengeti. Can his exotic menu and parlour games smooth over the insults and tensions of the previous nights? (Ep3/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Milton Keynes. Choir director Joseph gives his guests a warm welcome, as he serves Ghanaian dishes of chicken liver pâté and groundnut soup with coconut rice, and a musical treat. (Ep4/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Milton Keynes. After a tension-filled week, country lover Susan is confident that she can bring the group together with her back-to-basics French food and origami masterclass. (Ep5/5)

programme.title: Invasion of the Parakeets
programme.desc: Ring-necked parakeets are some of Britain's most divisive birds. Are they beautiful, charismatic newcomers, or an ecological menace to crops and native wildlife? Chris Packham investigates.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Six new teams take on citrus tarts and childhood-inspired chocolate fudgey showpieces. Whose gooey fudge will impress a judge, and whose tart will fall apart? (S11 Ep4)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: While recovering from leukaemia, Toby planned a radical new home - wrapped around an ancient oak tree - to improve his health and provide for his family. But building it isn't easy.

programme.title: Building Monaco's Superhomes
programme.desc: Luxury property developer Guy Phoenix embarks on his riskiest build yet: transforming a £16m apartment in Monaco into an opulent superhome. But things go wrong from the get-go... (Ep1/2)

programme.title: Building Monaco's Superhomes
programme.desc: As Guy Phoenix navigates the intricacies of transforming a £16m apartment in Monaco into an opulent superhome, the pressure's on to complete it in time for the upcoming Grand Prix. (Ep2/2)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man is experiencing life-threatening diabetic hypoglycaemia after falling down a flight of stairs. And a woman may have injured her side while sleepwalking. (S12 Ep2)

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time, the celebs watch Love Island, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Bake Off: The Professionals, Ladies First and This Morning (strippers). (S8 Ep2)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Coronation Street, Educating Yorkshire, The Great British Bake Off, The Inheritance, Stranded on Honeymoon Island, The Guest and The Dog House. (S26 Ep1)

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: The coppers are called to a hotel fire on the Brighton seafront. Hannah attends an attempted mugging. And a harrowing domestic violence call gets under Zoe and Jodie's skin. (S3 Ep6)

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: Solo boater Stuart lives out his lifelong dream of driving a train. The Wakefield Cubs have one last supper afloat as their canal adventure comes to a cosy close. (S3 Ep13/20)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Julia and Warren are relocating to the stunning Andalucían countryside, near the picturesque town of Álora. Scarlette Douglas helps them find the perfect property for their £95,000 budget.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Siblings Michael and Catherine are pooling their resources to buy a holiday home in Manilva on Spain's Costa del Sol. Jean Johansson shows them what their £175k can buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Motorcycle enthusiast Lisa sees what Brittany has to offer for her £160k. Will a fabulous farmhouse, a two-house treat or a lavish longère get her revved up enough to put in an offer?

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Terry and Ashley desperately try to complete their guest suite. New chateau owners Tim and Sharon have an unpleasant encounter in their tower bathroom. (S5 Ep3)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps motorbike lovers Gary and Lynn look for their dream holiday home in France's stunning Haute-Vienne region. Will any of Danni's options get them revved up?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Liverpool. Young-at-heart barber Kenny Flynn, who's always in search of a laugh, hosts the first night with a 'Big Kids' party theme. (Ep1/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Liverpool. Business owner Rob Spicer dresses up as Margaret Thatcher, as part of his historical leaders theme, and is joined by guests including 'the Queen' and 'Naomi Campbell'. (Ep2/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Liverpool. Nigerian model and barrister Cynthia Umezulike hopes to raise the bar with her menu of fish, joloff rice and an exotic fruit platter. (Ep3/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Liverpool. Hairy rocker Glen Simpson serves sticky blackened pork and an Elvis-inspired dessert of deep-fried chocolate bars in peanut butter ice cream. (Ep4/5)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Liverpool. Jilly Pollock hosts the last night with a menu of Jilly's figs, Jilly's hot beef and Jilly's berry delight. Can some ballroom dancing heal the tension between her guests? (Ep5/5)

programme.title: George Clarke's Beautiful Builds
programme.desc: In Worsley, George helps Katherine and Andrew to renovate their awkward abode and reveal its stunning view, while landscaper Luke tackles the steep, hazardous garden. (S2 Ep3)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: We're back in London. Have musicians Molly and Sam found harmony and a home? And it's a Crystal Palace catch up with Alan and Rachel, who've really made their home their own. (S45 Ep7)

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: The coppers are called to a hotel fire on the Brighton seafront. Hannah attends an attempted mugging. And a harrowing domestic violence call gets under Zoe and Jodie's skin. (S3 Ep6)

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: A moped delivery driver has collided with a car and his son is struggling to come to terms with it. A 78-year-old horse rider has internal bleeding after coming off his horse. (S3 Ep4)

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Cambridgeshire Police have a big problem: a murder hunt without a body. A complex search for clues takes them into the woods and across Europe, via a mysterious Facebook post.

programme.title: Jojo Rabbit
programme.desc: (2019) Oscar-winning comedy-drama from the mind of Taika Waititi, about a young boy in crumbling Nazi Germany who has an imaginary friend called Adolf Hitler. With Scarlett Johansson.

programme.title: So it's complicated
programme.desc: Nancy, a 34-year-old woman, tired of the countless dates her friends arrange for her, stumbles upon a 40-year-old divorcee - Jack. He mistakes her for her 24-year-old blind date and Nancy decides to pretend and continue with that story.

programme.title: Brilliant Mind
programme.desc: Frank is a single man who raises his 7-year-old niece Mary, a gifted girl who he wants to give a normal life. But when the girl's grandmother realizes her granddaughter's capabilities, she makes other plans for her that could separate Frank and Mary.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Shaun Murphy's unique ability to connect with a patient isolated by an immune deficiency produces an unexpected result. Doctors Claire Browne, Morgan Reznick and Marcus Andrews treat a 12-year-old patient who is about to go blind.

programme.title: The Good Doctor

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.desc: A poor girl from Southern Italy comes to Milan to escape an unfaithful fiancé and gets a job as a saleswoman in a department store. Quickly, the boss catches his attention.

programme.title: Diabolic Pursuit

programme.desc: Viola Vitale, Miss Italy and fashion journalist, returns to Sicily to look for her father. He starts working for a digital news company and teams up with police inspector Francesco Demir to solve crimes with the help of synesthesia.

programme.title: The Wrong Man (VO)
programme.desc: Rich restaurant owner Özgür prefers casual encounters to serious relationships. Ezgi wants to get married, but ends up being used by men. Özgür agrees to give him dating tips so that his next relationship with Serdar will work out.

programme.title: Room 309 (VO)

programme.title: A Taste of Death: A Mystery by Hannah Swensen
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Hannah Swensen when her mother, Delores, finds the lifeless body of a homeowner—a regular customer at The Cookie Jar—while searching for a home for her sister Michelle.

programme.desc: Suddenly realizing he loves his best friend, a womanizer takes advantage of his role as her "maid of honor" to ruin her wedding.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: One night, the attractive Christina Walters meets, unexpectedly and after years of avoiding serious relationships with men, her soulmate.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: Why complicate things when you can keep having fun every night at the club? That seems to be the motto of three friends: Christina, Courtney and Jane. Until one night Christina meets the ideal man who then disappears.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Legacy
programme.desc: Tracy meets Nick again and he helps her save the original draft of a well-known poem, in exchange for her helping him run his restaurant. But Tracy begins to feel uncomfortable as the two grow closer...

programme.title: The Good Doctor

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Andreina discovers that it was Umberto Guarnieri who denounced her and now she is forced to choose between remaining in prison or giving in to the blackmail of the man who ruined her.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Elena looks for a way to get closer to Agnese, but the woman becomes increasingly impatient with the girl's presence, who finds an unexpected refuge in Gabriella and Roberta's house.

programme.title: Sandokan: The Pirate Prince
programme.desc: Sandokan, in command of his crew, boards a ship to steal its cargo and frees a Dayak prisoner. The man is convinced that Sandokan is the warrior foretold by an ancient prophecy, but Sandokan pays no attention to this.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Ender and Yildiz try to trap Sahika using Nadir, while tension grows in Kaya's house. Between mistakes and suspicions, an unexpected error complicates plans even further.

programme.title: War of the Sexes
programme.desc: The real story of the tennis game in 1973, which pitted world No. 1 Billie Jean King and former champion Bobby Riggs face-to-face on the court - in a true war of the sexes.

programme.title: Sandokan: The Pirate Prince
programme.desc: Marianne celebrates her 21st birthday. Both Sandokan and Brooke are invited to the dance. There is some tension between the three, but Sandokan must first free Yanez and his crew.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.sub-title: White Like The Beginning and The End
programme.desc: Viola is unable to help Demir with his investigations after he starts taking medication for his illness. She decides to return to Paris and abandon the search for her father. Without knowing it, you put yourself in danger. Will Demir be able to save her?

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Ezgi burns everything that reminds her of her ex-boyfriend with her friends. Özgür tells Ebru the truth, but is caught by Ezgi. Zeynep tricks Cansu. Deniz goes to Ozan's restaurant.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: The therapist tells Lale that he identified Onur as a father figure because he grew up without a father and is now struggling with a lack of trust issue. Songül and Yildiz go to the therapist's office to give some information about Onur and Lale.

programme.title: Butter
programme.desc: Laura Pickler enjoys the privilege of being the sidekick to Iowa's state butter carving champion for 15 years. But this position is threatened with the arrival of an unlikely competitor: a 10-year-old girl, full of talent!

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: While Shaun struggles to understand how he feels about Carly and Lea, Claire turns to her past to make a connection with a troubled patient. Andrews needs to understand how to operate on a woman who refuses anesthesia.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: As Carly and Shaun struggle to reconnect, they will have to team up to treat a marathon runner with a mysterious illness. Claire fights to help a teenager whose brain tumor returns.

programme.title: eternal love
programme.desc: Emir uses Zeynep as bait to trap Asu, and Nihan follows the two. The situation becomes very tense when Kemal discovers where they are.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Halit accuses Ender of treason after missing key evidence against Nadir, while Yildiz becomes embroiled in the conflict. At the same time, the relationship between Yigit and Lila deteriorates again and triggers new consequences.

programme.title: I love you to death
programme.desc: The symbiotic relationship between mother Camile, who suffers from Munchausen syndrome, and her daughter Esme ends tragically when Esme discovers the truth about her true physical condition.

programme.title: Romance to the rescue
programme.desc: To impress a potential love interest, Kyra enters her dog in an agility contest. The problem is that she doesn't have a dog, so she needs to find (and train) one, and quickly.

programme.title: The legend of Zorro
programme.desc: 1850. California has been tortured by the colonizers for years but will finally become the thirty-first state of the Union. Zorro suspects that a group of individuals intend to sabotage this decision for their own benefit, so he will stop them in a heroic feat. At the same time, McGivens, a French baron, is dedicated to blackmailing the inhabitants of California to keep their lands and leaving those who earned their living from the countryside in absolute poverty. Don Alejandro de la Vega, the one nicknamed "Zorro" with his mask, his sword, his horse and his cape, has finally been able to marry the beautiful Elena and has a ten-year-old son named Joaquín. The little boy misses his father, whom he hardly sees, and on the other hand idealizes the figure of his hero, Zorro, without knowing what his true identity is. Alejandro promises to leave the mask behind forever and dedicate himself to his family, but when a new crisis appears in California, he acts once again to solve it. Elena, feeling cheated, kicks her husband out of the house and presents him with divorce papers. At that moment, an old companion of the woman arrives at the scene: the French aristocrat Army. When he finds out about Elena's separation, he immediately begins to court her while attending to his affairs in the secret brotherhood in which he is involved. Now Alejandro will have to choose between alleviating the suffering of the oppressed or returning to his family. But to do so he must defeat the always shady Baron Army. For "The Legend of Zorro" both Steven Spielberg and Robert Rodriguez planned to direct the film, but in the end they did not take the job, although Spielberg did stay on as executive producer.

programme.title: Haute couture
programme.desc: Esther, first seamstress at the House of Dior, works on her latest Haute Couture collection, before retiring. Jade, a 20-year-old girl, steals her purse on the subway. Days later, repentant, she decides to go and return it. Esther decides to offer him a chance.

programme.title: The jury
programme.desc: A young New Orleans widow files a civil lawsuit against a powerful corporate consortium whom she blames for her husband's death. Thus, a multimillion-dollar case is launched. Judicial thriller based on a novel by John Grisham, a best-selling writer who is well versed in all the ins and outs of United States law.

programme.title: elite mercenaries
programme.desc: Billionaire technology CEO Donovan Chalmers hires a group of deadly mercenaries to protect a piece of technology that, if exposed, could destroy the world. Their mission becomes even more risky when Chalmers' daughter is kidnapped by the dangerous terrorist group 'The Pardoners', who will stop at nothing to obtain the valuable and dangerous technology.

programme.title: No reservations
programme.desc: Kate Armstrong is a brilliant and demanding haute cuisine chef in charge of a famous restaurant. Her perfectionist and meticulous nature means that she does not accept criticism very well, which causes her boss to force her to go to therapy if she wants to continue maintaining her position as a chef. After the tragic death of her sister in a car accident, Kate is forced to take care of Zoe, her 9-year-old niece who has just been orphaned. Her new family situation causes Kate to face real problems reconciling her work day with taking care of Zoe, so her boss decides to give her a few days of vacation so she can adapt to the changes. After a few days of rest, Kate returns to work with more strength. However, upon her arrival the chef meets Nick Palmer, a chef who likes to take risks and bet on new ideas and who has been hired to replace her in her absence. The restaurant manager is delighted with Nick, so she decides to make him a permanent part of the staff, which will cause Kate to feel threatened. Rivalry will arise between both chefs due to their totally opposite characters and their different ways of working. Little by little, Kate and Nick will transform their rivalry into love, a process in which little Zoe will have a lot to do with.

programme.title: Love without an appointment
programme.desc: Romantic comedy from film director Ben Palmer, who focuses especially on directing television series, including "The Inbetweeners" and "Comedy Lab." Nancy is a thirty-four-year-old woman who spends another day of being hungover, tired of not having a partner and still being single at her age. Her group of friends try to advise her to find someone, but she is not up to the task and does not always listen to them. His parents have had a very different story from his and they enjoy the happiest and most perfect relationship. When Nancy heads through the streets of London on her way to her parents' anniversary, she can't imagine that she will meet someone who will change her destiny forever: Jack. Jack is a forty-year-old divorced man who mistakes her for his blind date, a girl ten years younger than Nancy. She takes advantage of the opportunity presented to her and pretends to be his blind date, thus beginning one of the craziest trips of her life with an unknown man with whom she soon hits it off. Nancy ends up thinking that Jack is the perfect boyfriend for her, but he keeps thinking that he is who he really is not. Lake Bell, the actress who plays Nancy in the film, used a British accent throughout filming, even when they were not filming, so the entire crew assumed that the actress was British and did not find out the truth until the end of filming. The film was shot entirely in the United Kingdom, with the majority of scenes in recording studios.

programme.title: It happened in Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa Ventura is a single, hard-working, intelligent and determined mother who dreams of achieving a better life. While she works hard as a cleaning lady in a luxurious Manhattan hotel, her heart falls in love with Christopher Marshall, a rising politician who, upon seeing her, mistakes her for one of the hotel's high-society guests.

programme.title: The President and Miss Wade
programme.desc: Andrew Shepherd (Michael Douglas), president of the United States and widower for just over a year, begins a romance with Sydney Wade (Annette Benning), a consultant for an important environmental organization. This relationship, in the middle of the election campaign, will be taken advantage of by Bob Rumson (Richard Dreyfuss), the opposing candidate, to attack the president.

programme.title: The debt collector 2
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors suddenly find themselves involved in a highly dangerous situation in which they try to hunt down several criminals while fleeing from a gangster.

programme.title: Point Break (Sin límites)
programme.desc: Remake of the film 'They Call Him Bodhi', directed in 1991 by Kathryn Bigelow ('The Darkest Night'). Johnny, a young FBI agent, infiltrates a team of elite athletes led by Boshi. Johnny's mission is to discover if the gang is behind a series of deaths and unusual robberies that are causing the world economy to plummet. Therefore, covertly and trying not to discover his true identity, the agent will have to risk his life to find evidence that will allow him to incriminate the gang and capture it. However, when he begins to form a friendship with the leader, Johnny will question whose side he is on and what he should do.

programme.title: They call him Bodhi
programme.desc: The FBI suspects that a group of surfers are responsible for a series of bank robberies, so they send agent Johnny Utah to infiltrate them. Utah manages to gain their trust by participating in the extreme activities they engage in and befriends Bodhi, the group's leader. Utah is becoming more integrated every day and will soon have to decide between his obligations as a member of the FBI and his loyalty to Bodhi.

programme.title: Beauty and the beast
programme.desc: Adaptation of the story of Beauty and the Beast. When Bella's father is shipwrecked, she is exiled to the countryside. The land belongs to the kingdom of the Beast, from whom he steals a rose and is sentenced to death. Belle sacrifices herself for her father and goes to live in Beast's castle. There he will investigate the secrets that surround its owner and discover that he was a prince. True love will arise between them without expecting it.

programme.title: Shopping center superpoli
programme.desc: Paul Blart is a single father trying to make a living as a security officer at a shopping center. When a robbery closes the doors of the center, the security officer will have to become a real police officer.

programme.title: Superpoli in Las Vegas
programme.desc: Paul Blart is a security guard who must travel to Las Vegas to supervise a Security Guard Exhibition, and he takes the opportunity to take his daughter, Maya, before she goes to study abroad. What Paul did not expect is that some criminals commit a robbery in the middle of the exhibition, having to demonstrate what he has learned in his training.

programme.title: Escape from Alcatraz
programme.desc: Frank Morris, a prisoner specialized in escapes with a very high intelligence quotient, is imprisoned in Alcatraz prison. In his head he keeps preparing an escape plan that will not be risk-free.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Peter Parker and Mary Jane are finally together. They have both been able to accept their feelings and start a relationship. Mary Jane has landed a great role on Broadway and Peter continues to put on the Spiderman suit, helping those in need and capturing the city's criminals. Life seems to smile at them, even though their friend Harry continues to blame Peter for his father's death. But this is not the only threat that looms over the protagonists. An alien entity with symbiotic and violent behavior has arrived on Earth. Peter comes into contact with it, but even though his powers seem to increase when it envelops him, Peter realizes the dangers it poses and gets rid of it. The alien possesses Eddie Brocks, giving rise to a new and feared villain called Venom. At the same time, another villain begins to operate in the city, Sandman. Finally, Venom and Sandman kidnap Mary Jane and Spiderman must save her with the help of an unexpected ally. Director Sam Raimi was against the appearance of the Venom character in his film due to the character's lack of humanity. But producer Avi Arad convinced him that he had a large group of followers who read his stories in the Spider-Man comics and that he should appear. Topher Grace's performance definitely convinced him of Venom's appearance in this third installment of the saga. It took three years to make the special effects related to Sandman's powers, many experiments were carried out to analyze the behavior of the sand and digitally imitate it on the big screen.

programme.title: A doctor in the countryside
programme.desc: After 30 years working as the only doctor in a small village in a rural area of ​​southern France, Jean-Pierre falls ill. Health problems remove the doctor who treated, cured and cared for his neighbors from the profession 365 days a year and at any time. That is why it is necessary for another person to move in to replace him during sick leave. At that moment, Nathalie, a young doctor who has just finished her residency and who also has extensive experience as a nurse, arrives in the village. She will be in charge of helping Pierre with his work when he can't, but it will be a professional challenge because she has never worked in a medical office in a small town. In this way, it will also be complicated for Jean-Pierre because for him his work is the most important thing, so he will have to learn to deal with his new partner.

programme.title: Darrow y Darrow: En clave de asesinato
programme.desc: Claire and Miles go on a date at the club where Miles' little sister sings. The next day she is arrested for murdering the music producer she just fired and Claire takes the case.

programme.title: The jury
programme.desc: A young New Orleans widow files a civil lawsuit against a powerful corporate consortium whom she blames for her husband's death. Thus, a multimillion-dollar case is launched. Judicial thriller based on a novel by John Grisham, a best-selling writer who is well versed in all the ins and outs of United States law.

programme.title: Essence of woman
programme.desc: Remake of the film 'Scent of a Woman', from 1974. Charlie is a young man who studies at a private school thanks to a scholarship. In order to get some money, he works on weekends. One day, he becomes the guide for a rude retired colonel who suffers from blindness and is ready to commit suicide. Little by little, the cold relationship between the two grows closer into a beautiful friendship that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: The agent
programme.desc: In the year 2030, the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and faces serious environmental problems as a result of global warming. All those citizens who are unproductive are exiled to a colony.

programme.title: elite mercenaries
programme.desc: Billionaire technology CEO Donovan Chalmers hires a group of deadly mercenaries to protect a piece of technology that, if exposed, could destroy the world. Their mission becomes even more risky when Chalmers' daughter is kidnapped by the dangerous terrorist group 'The Pardoners', who will stop at nothing to obtain the valuable and dangerous technology.

programme.title: The wanted
programme.desc: Henry Fonda is a priest persecuted by the authorities after the government has banned religion. His decision is to flee to another country, but at the border he will have difficulty getting out and will have to disguise himself. The film, directed by John Ford, is based on a novel by Graham Greene.

programme.title: A doctor in the countryside
programme.desc: After 30 years working as the only doctor in a small village in a rural area of ​​southern France, Jean-Pierre falls ill. In this way, it will also be complicated for Jean-Pierre because for him his work is the most important thing, so he will have to learn to deal with his new partner.

programme.title: The flight
programme.desc: Commander Whip Whitaker is forced to make an emergency landing of the aircraft he is piloting, thereby saving many lives. He is considered a hero, until the subsequent investigation reveals that he had used narcotics the night before the incident. The pilot faces a trial in which he must put his career and his own life in order.

programme.title: survive tonight
programme.desc: The home of a disgraced doctor is invaded by two criminals. One of them was shot during a robbery. Although the doctor tries to help him, his knowledge is insufficient to stop the bleeding. His only concern is to protect his family at all costs.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Upon returning from a mission in Mombasa, elite soldier Ray Garrison and his wife are kidnapped and murdered. Shortly afterward, Ray awakens in the Project Spirit Reborn facility with no memory of his past.

programme.title: The truth about Charlie
programme.desc: Regina is thinking about divorcing Charlie. When she returns to Paris after her vacation in Martinique, her husband has been murdered and her checking account and home have been looted. Three of Charlie's former friends pursue her to recover money that she knows nothing about and the police see her as the main suspect. Her situation is increasingly dangerous and confusing, as she also has to face her feelings for Joshua, whom she met in Martinique.

programme.title: The mask of Zorro
programme.desc: 1821. The Mexican army strives to liberate its country from the Spanish yoke. In the Californias area, the evil Spanish governor, Don Rafael Montero, is about to lose everything. In a last attempt to catch his nemesis, the masked swordsman "Zorro", Montoro prepares to murder three innocents. With the help of two orphans, Joaquín and Alejandro Murrieta, Zorro frees the prisoners. Then he will give both boys a special medallion and flee on his horse, Tornado, after marking Montero with a small "Z" on his neck as a warning. But that same night the soldiers enter the house of a nobleman named Don Diego de la Vega and arrest him since they are convinced that he is the real Zorro. Don Diego's wife dies, he is locked up in prison and his daughter, Elena, is taken to Spain as Montoro's daughter, where he will raise her as if she were his own. Twenty years later, Montoro secretly returns to California and looks for Diego in prison but cannot find him because he is unrecognizable due to age. However, the prisoner does remember the man and with a thirst for revenge like he had never had before, he escapes from prison and decides to put an end to his enemy forever. Along the way he will discover Elena, his daughter, who is as beautiful as her mother when she was murdered. Tired, old and completely destroyed by the years of captivity, Don Diego de la Vega will decide to train an adult Alejandro Muerrieta, now a bandit and rogue, to become the new Zorro and avenge all the suffering that the evil Rafael Montero caused him. At first Anthony Hopkins rejected the role of Don Diego de la Vega because he had unbearable pain in his back. When a laser operation managed to alleviate the problem, he then offered to accept playing the wise old "Zorro."

Life seems to smile at them, even though their friend Harry continues to blame Peter for his father's death. But this is not the only threat that looms over the protagonists. An alien entity with symbiotic and violent behavior has arrived on Earth. Peter comes into contact with it, but even though his powers seem to increase when it envelops him, Peter realizes the dangers it poses and gets rid of it. The alien possesses Eddie Brocks, giving rise to a new and feared villain called Venom. At the same time, another villain begins to operate in the city, Sandman. Finally, Venom and Sandman kidnap Mary Jane and Spiderman must save her with the help of an unexpected ally. Director Sam Raimi was against the appearance of the Venom character in his film due to the character's lack of humanity. But producer Avi Arad convinced him that he had a large group of followers who read his stories in the Spider-Man comics and that he should appear. Topher Grace's performance definitely convinced him of Venom's appearance in this third installment of the saga. It took three years to make the special effects related to Sandman's powers, many experiments were carried out to analyze the behavior of the sand and digitally imitate it on the big screen.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: force team
programme.desc: With the American football league very advanced and the possibility of reaching the finals, the Washington Sentinels players decide to go on strike. To solve such a delicate situation, the team owner hires legendary coach Jimmy McGinty and proposes an almost impossible challenge: recruit a team of substitutes in one week. Once the first step is taken, you will have to face an even more difficult mission; coach this peculiar group of unknown and somewhat "losing" players, led by Shane Falco.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: In 1970, the Apollo 13 spacecraft makes one of many routine trips through space towards the Moon. Astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert, who were supposed to fly on Apollo 14, are relegated to this mission that is unimportant in popular opinion. Everything changes when the ship is already outside the Earth, heading towards the Moon, and an explosion inside the space module threatens the entire crew. This is the mission that made famous the phrase 'Houston, we have a problem' and tells the story of how the astronauts did everything possible to survive, at the same time that, from Earth, NASA workers tried to plan a strategy to bring their men back home. To achieve true weightlessness, the cast and crew flew in NASA's KC-135 plane, nicknamed 'The Vomit Comet.' Some of the scenes in which the Earth can be seen from the windows of Apollo 13, the images of the planet are photographs taken by astronauts Jim Lovell and Bill Anders on the Apollo 8 mission. In the original recording of the real Apollo 13 mission, the phrase Lovell pronounces is not 'Houston, we have a problem', but rather 'Ahh, Houston, we have had a problem.' According to the director, Ron Howard, that phrase indicated that the problem had already passed, so he decided to change it to the present, so that the tension would not decrease. Actor Brad Pitt had the opportunity to participate in this film, but he turned down the job to play the protagonist of 'Seven'.

programme.title: The source of life
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: Invictus
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of the book "Playing the enemy" by John Carlin. In 1990 Nelson Mandela became President of his country, after having been released from prison. One of his most important measures was the abolition of apartheid. He intended to achieve reconciliation between the black and white populations. It was in 1995 when he used the Rugby World Cup in South Africa as an instrument to achieve national unity.

programme.title: Asia Specific
programme.desc: Australia's government is changing tax rules in a bid to help younger first time home buyers get on to the property ladder. programme.title: The Climate Question
programme.desc: A global programme that reflects the variety of takes on climate change, how best to understand it and the world's attempts to avert it, temper it or adapt to it. It is not about questioning whether climate change is happening, it's about finding the best ways to respond to it. This is sharp-edged, analytical inquiry. Hard scrutiny, touched with a sense of adventure and discovery, and where we can find it, hope. It includes stories from across the world on why we find it so hard to save our own planet, and how we might change that.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: Not long ago, artificial intelligence was being sold as a science-fiction reality, a force that could transform society, cure disease, and remake the economy. Now, the mood is shifting. The companies driving the boom are racing for investment while grappling with a tougher reality: AI is costly, unpredictable, and not yet profitable. Even some of its creators warn progress may be too fast, as public anxiety grows and political resistance takes shape. Is AI now at a tipping point - caught between financial pressure, technological risk and a rising backlash?

programme.title: Election 26
programme.desc: Laura Kuenssberg is your guide as three parliamentary constituencies choose a new MP. The BBC's political editor, Chris Mason, is at the count in Makerfield, where the mayor of Greater Manchester, Andy Burnham, is seeking a return to Westminster. Scotland correspondents are live in Aberdeen and Arbroath, as the SNP tries to hold two marginal seats that it won at the 2024 General Election. Political correspondent Alex Forsyth is in the studio, keeping her sharp eye across the latest political reaction. Professor Sir John Curtice analyses the key electoral trends. And a panel of senior politicians give their reactions to the verdicts.

programme.title: Sunan Gunung Jati - Nyi Rara Santang Masuk Islam
programme.desc: Saksikan kisah Nyi Rara Santang, sosok legendaris dari Jawa Barat.

programme.title: Cintaku Seluas TPU
programme.desc: Vita marah pada Ferly yang ketahuan selingkuh dengan Yoana. Vita mengebut dengan mobilnya dan hampir menabrak Abi. Di hari yang sama dia mendapat kabar kakeknya meninggal dan Vita di beri warisan lahan TPU.

programme.title: Cincin Wali
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dari kota melihat gadis yang pernah ditemuinya dalam mimpi. Dia memutuskan untuk tinggal di pesantren yang sama dengan gadis tersebut. Namun, untuk mendapatkan gadis itu dia harus memperoleh cincin wali.

programme.title: Pembalap Insyaf
programme.desc: Vivi harus menghidupi keluarganya dengan bekerja sebagai pembalap liar untuk Angga. Sementara Bayu adalah seorang polisi. Ketika balapan liar digerebek secara tiba-tiba. Vivi melarikan diri dan pingsan di sebuah musala.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 5
programme.desc: Mada dan kawan-kawan sangat optimis akan memenangkan pertandingan ini dari Tim Malaysia, juara bertahan empat tahun berturut-turut. Saksikanlah pertandingan silat antara Tim Indonesia melawan Tim Malaysia!

programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat : Teko 1001 Malam
programme.desc: Rani, cewek cupu yang dirundung teman-temannya dan kerap mendapat perlakuan buruk. Ia mendapat perlakuan kasar dari tantenya. Rani menemukan sebuah teko, ketika digosok keluarlah sosok jin yang bisa mengabulkan tiga permintaan.

programme.title: Kecantol Derek Cinta
programme.desc: Mona dan Ryan dipertemukan karena derek mobil, atau lebih tepatnya karena mobilnya diderek oleh Ryan karena melanggar peraturan parkir. Apa kisah mereka hanya sampai di sini?

programme.title: Cinta Dalam Semangkok Bakwan Malang
programme.desc: Seorang gadis dan seorang lelaki bertemu dalam sebuah perjumpaan yang tidak menyenangkan di pasar, benarkah mereka takkan bertemu lagi? Atau akankah takdir berkata lain?

programme.title: Putri Langit Cari Jodoh
programme.desc: Anjani, putri khayangan yang diturunkan ke bumi selama 100 hari untuk mencari pemuda sebagai calon suami. Sebelum turun ke bumi, Anjani dibekali kalung yang menjadi sumber kekuatannya. Siapa yang menjadi pilihan sang puteri?

programme.title: Punched by Love
programme.desc: Meskipun ibunya melarang, Indah tetap ingin menjadi seorang petinju. Saat sanggar tinju mengeluarkannya karena kesalahan pengisian data, Indah belajar kepada seorang rekan sesama petinju. Dan cinta pun tumbuh di antara mereka.

programme.title: Radio Kabar Buruk
programme.desc: Seorang wartawan yang sering membuat marah atasannya karena lambat bekerja dan selalu ketinggalan berita. Setelah menemukan radio antik di Toko Kr. Amat, dia selalu mengetahui semua peristiwa-peristiwa penting.

programme.title: Sunan Gunung Jati Tobatnya Ki Jagabaya
programme.desc: Warga desa sudah membayar upeti kepada Kesultanan Cirebon pimpinan Sunan Gunung Jati, karena mereka tahu upeti tersebut untuk kesejahteraan rakyat. Namun Patih Kerajaan tetap memaksa mereka untuk membayar upeti lagi pada Raja

programme.title: Cintaku Di Kejar Cicilan
programme.desc: Andre adalah pria tampan yang selalu bergaya dengan barang-barang mewah. Namun, semua itu dibeli Andre dengan berutang, akhirnya dia pun dikejar cicilan yang menumpuk.

programme.title: Dari Mata-Mata Turun Ke Hati
programme.desc: Tanpa disangka Raisa bertemu kembali dengan Radit, cowok gebetan Raisa semasa SMU dulu. Raisa meminta bantuan Firsa, sahabatnya untuk memata-matai Radit. Setelah bertemu dengan Radit, Firsa malah jatuh hati kepada Radit.

programme.title: Ku Jahit Cinta Dengan Bismillah
programme.desc: Lila adalah anak yatim yang bekerja sebagai penjahit. Saat sedang mengantarkan hasil jahitan, dia menabrak motor Robby. Sebagai ganti rugi, Lila harus berpura-pura menjadi pacarnya. Seiring waktu berjalan, tumbuh rasa cinta.

programme.title: Mantan Pacarku Superhero
programme.desc: Seorang mahasiswa yang menyebalkan dan sok jagoan, tiba-tiba mendapatkan pacar yang ternyata benar-benar seorang pahlawan super. Namun sang pacar ternyata luar biasa posesif dan memakai kekuatan supernya untuk meneror mahasiswa.

programme.title: Mantan Pacarku Superhero
programme.desc: Seorang mahasiswa yang menyebalkan dan sok jagoan, tiba-tiba mendapatkan pacar yang ternyata benar-benar seorang pahlawan super. Namun sang pacar ternyata luar biasa posesif dan memakai kekuatan supernya untuk meneror mahasiswa.

programme.title: Pacar Dari Langit
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya sakit. Mega terpaksa pulang ke kampung halaman dan jatuh cinta kepada alien bernama Zen. yang berjanji akan selalu menjaganya.

programme.title: Cinta Lutung Kasarung
programme.desc: Rara yang culas dan ambisius kecewa ketika Sari terpilih sebagai pewaris utama Prabu. Rara bersekongkol dengan Indra untuk menyingkirkan Sari dengan memberinya ramuan yang membuat kulitnya bersisik dan bersembunyi di hutan.

programme.title: Kembalikan Tubuhku
programme.desc: Dinda dan Marsya mengalami sebuah kecelakaan. Kejadian ini membuat Marsya dan Dinda bertukar tubuh. Dinda masuk ke tubuh Marsya dan menggunakan tubuhnya. Namun justru permasalahan baru dimulai. Bagaimanakah kisah mereka?

programme.title: Pejantan Tanggung 02
programme.desc: Akhirnya keempat sahabat ini kembali bersatu dan melupakan kejadian di masa lalu. Ketika mereka saling terbuka tentang perasaan mereka, persahabatan mereka pun dipertaruhkan.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 1
programme.desc: Mada dan Ken, yang sering di hajar oleh Williard seorang juara bertahan MMA. Ketika Ken dihajar habis-habisan oleh Williard hingga masuk rumah sakit, Gajahmada lalu memutuskan untuk belajar silat dan mengalahkan Williard.

programme.title: 7 Pusaka - Sabuk Penghilang Raga
programme.desc: Raga, maling kelas teri yang bernasib sial. Saat dikejar para warga dan bersembunyi di dalam sebuah kali, tiba-tiba Raga menemukan sebuah koin gobang yang hanyut. Saat Raga menggenggam koin itu, tiba-tiba saja ia menghilang.

programme.title: Mantan Pacarku Superhero
programme.desc: Seorang mahasiswa yang menyebalkan dan sok jagoan, tiba-tiba mendapatkan pacar yang ternyata benar-benar seorang pahlawan super. Namun sang pacar ternyata luar biasa posesif dan memakai kekuatan supernya untuk meneror mahasiswa.

programme.title: Kabayan Mencari Cinta
programme.desc: Sosok legendaris tanah Sunda, Kabayan, kembali hadir. Kali ini, dia bertekad untuk melengkapi kehidupan asmaranya: ia mencari cinta!

programme.title: Sunan Gunung Jati - Nyi Rara Santang Masuk Islam
programme.desc: Saksikan kisah Nyi Rara Santang, sosok legendaris dari Jawa Barat.

programme.title: Telur Asin Cap Cinta
programme.desc: Tanpa sengaja Dhira merusak ponsel Cindy, dia pun bingung karena dia juga punya utang kepada orang lain. Akhirnya dia memutuskan berjualan telur asin.

programme.title: Prajurit Bantegan
programme.desc: Igo pindah dari kota besar setelah kedua orang tuanya meninggal. Saat mendapat masalah dengan pemilik sanggar bantengan, dia bertemu Ki Sungkur yang menolongnya. Sejak itu dia berguru silat kepada Ki Sungkur.

programme.title: Sunan Gresik - Pemanggil Hujan
programme.desc: Sunan Gresik memasuki wilayah Majapahit untuk membantu desa yang kekeringan sekaligus menyebarkan agama Islam. Saat Sunan Gresik meminta ijin sang kepala desa, dia ditolak. Namun Sunan Gresik tetap bertahan di desa tersebut.

programme.title: Crazy Shaolin Disciples
programme.desc: Tiga pendekar kung fu dari latar belakang yang sangat berbeda menjadi murid Shaolin di kuil yang sama: Lo Lieh sang Pengawal Kerajaan, Lo Meng sang tentara yang melarikan diri, dan Wang Yu si pria desa.

programme.title: Rendezvous With Death
programme.desc: Disutradarai oleh Sun Chung, seorang sutradara berbakat, film ini berkisah tentang seorang ahli pedang yang melindungi sebuah peti harta karun dalam sebuah perjalanan yang berbahaya.

programme.title: The Crimson Palm
programme.desc: Kisah ini bercerita tentang Lin Shao-teh, seorang mahasiswa miskin yang bertunangan dengan Chien-king, putri dari seorang miliarder bernama Wang Chun.

programme.title: Murder Plot
programme.desc: Saat merencanakan pembalasan terhadap Huan yang kejam, istri Shen Lang mengacaukan konferensi dan harus diantar pulang. Dalam perjalanan pulang, mereka terjebak dalam perangkap Huan yang mematikan.

programme.title: The Comedy Of Mismatches
programme.desc: Dua pasangan kekasih saling tertukar secara tidak sengaja. Sang pria menyamar sebagai wanita untuk upacara pernikahan saudara perempuannya, sedangkan kekasihnya menyamar sebagai pria untuk menikahi wanita lain.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: David Chiang menjadi tokoh budiman yang menolong pendekar pedang tak bersalah yang dipenjara karena dituduh mencuri. Bersama mereka mendobrak penjara dan menggertak para penjahat.

programme.title: The Monkey Goes West
programme.desc: Film mengesankan yang diangkat dari kisah klasik Perjalanan Ke Barat ini menampilkan interpretasi nan unik yang dibumbui dengan humor, aksi laga dan kisah fantasi.

programme.title: My Rebellious Son
programme.desc: Seorang pejabat korup berusaha mencuri patung Buddha nan sangat berharga dari kuil untuk menyenangkan sekelompok orang dari Barat. Dokter Zhang dan putranya berhasil mengalahkan musuh dan menyelamatkan patung itu.

programme.title: Scandal
programme.desc: Saat berandalan Zhen dan sahabatnya Chia mengumpulkan bukti-bukti korupsi para pejabat, mereka menuntut untuk menjadi gubernur di negara itu.

programme.title: Village Of Tigers
programme.desc: Para penduduk jahat dari Desa Macan, yang dipimpin oleh Hu Jiao, berencana untuk membunuh Lo Hong Shun, atau dikenal sebagai Pahlawan Pedang dari Langit Selatan.

programme.title: Beyond The Great Wall
programme.desc: Wang Zhao Jun tak mau menyuap seorang pelukis kekaisaran sehingga si pelukis menggambar potret jelek dirinya, yang membuatnya tak dipilih oleh Kaisar sampai mereka bertemu langsung.

programme.title: Swordsman At Large
programme.desc: Para bandit, gadis cantik dan ahli pedang bertarung untuk bertahan hidup dalam kisah menarik tentang penipuan, pengkhianatan dan kematian ini.

programme.title: Facets Of Love
programme.desc: Berlatar pada era Dinasti Ming, film ini mengisahkan gadis-gadis yang bekerja di suatu rumah bordil, termasuk seorang gadis dari keluarga miskin yang dijual oleh ibunya dan berharap dapat mengubah nasibnya.

programme.title: Wits Of The Brats
programme.desc: Tou Kuan adalah seorang pemuda cerdas dari keluarga berada. Ia telah mengalahkan semua penduduk di kotanya dan memutuskan untuk menaklukkan Tiga Pemuda Cerdas dari Utara.

programme.title: The Thundering Sword
programme.desc: Yu, murid sang Guru Besar, dan Chiao Chiao, putri dari musuh bebuyutannya, berada dalam masalah saat mereka jatuh cinta. Hal ini diperparah ketika Chiao Chiao membunuh seorang pria di klan Yu.

programme.title: The Thundering Sword
programme.desc: Yu, murid sang Guru Besar, dan Chiao Chiao, putri dari musuh bebuyutannya, berada dalam masalah saat mereka jatuh cinta. Hal ini diperparah ketika Chiao Chiao membunuh seorang pria di klan Yu.

programme.title: Call Of The Sea
programme.desc: Seorang nelayan muda bernama Chin Hu jatuh cinta dengan teman masa kecilnya, Hsiao Yu. Namun, putra satu-satunya preman di sana terpukau pada kecantikan Hsiao Yu dan mencoba segala cara untuk mendekatinya.

programme.title: Iron Bodyguard
programme.desc: Wang Wu, seorang kepala perusahaan keamanan Iron Bodyguard, bertemu dengan seorang murid yang merupakan anggota Reformis, kelompok sarjana yang mendesak reformasi sosial di Tiongkok pada akhir dinasti Qing.

programme.title: The Pure And The Evil
programme.desc: Reuni dua teman SMA yang semula manis segera berubah menjadi mimpi buruk erotis yang mengerikan ketika Rose tertarik pada mantan teman sekelasnya, Fang, dan tunangan barunya!

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: Usai saudaranya membunuh kepala triad saingannya, Jie menjadi tersangka dan diburu oleh para pembunuh. Dengan bantuan Nan, ia akhirnya menghabisi musuhnya, tapi kemudian ia tahu bahwa Nan lah yang membunuh ayahnya.

programme.title: Challenge Of The Gamesters
programme.desc: Wong Jing menciptakan genre film perjudian hampir sendirian, dan dalam salah satu film laris awalnya, Shih Hsien memimpin pemeran bintang dalam kisah tentang mata-mata, taipan, dan gadis cantik.

programme.title: The Master
programme.desc: Gao, murid dari ahli seni bela diri Shi. Suatu hari, ia secara tak sengaja menyelamatkan musuh tuannya, Jin, hingga ia mengajarinya seni bela diri nan unik sebagai balasannya. Namun, Master Shi mengira Gao berkhianat.

programme.title: We Love Millionaires
programme.desc: Tiga gadis pramuniaga cantik asal Hong Kong pergi ke utara untuk menyamar sebagai orang kaya dan mewujudkan impian mereka untuk menikahi pria kaya.

programme.title: Shaolin Prince
programme.desc: Ketika Kaisar dibunuh dan takhtanya dirampas oleh Lord 9, kedua pangeran yang masih bayi dipercayakan dalam perawatan tiga biksu Shaolin dan sang perdana menteri.

programme.title: Sweet And Wild
programme.desc: Hsiao Fang adalah seorang gadis yang tidak takut untuk melawan para preman. Sayangnya, ia mengira Ma Ta-hai yang tampan sebagai salah satu preman itu. Keduanya saling tertarik, namun mereka menolak untuk mengakuinya.

programme.title: Dragon Swamp
programme.desc: Ksatria Pengembara menghadapi Guru Naga Rawa dalam perseteruan keluarga yang telah berlangsung selama 20 tahun. Dalam film aksi nan epik dan emosional ini, semua orang memperebutkan Pedang Naga Giok.

programme.title: Moods Of Love
programme.desc: Film yang berlatar di era Dinasti Song ini mengisahkan dua cerita tentang seberapa jauh seseorang akan berkorban demi cinta atau nafsu.

programme.title: Raw Passions
programme.desc: Seorang istri yang setia menguak sebuah jaringan pemerasan dan penipuan setelah suaminya ditipu oleh seorang penari perut yang licik. Saat sang penari ditikam, keadaan pun menjadi semakin tak terkendali.

programme.title: Hex
programme.desc: Seorang istri yang sakit parah bekerjasama dengan asisten rumah tangganya untuk membunuh sang suami yang kasar. Namun, hal ini menyebabkan serangkaian kejadian mengerikan.

programme.title: Empress Wu
programme.desc: Wu Ze Tian adalah seorang selir Kaisar Tang yang berusia 14 tahun nan cantik dan berbakat. Ia menjadi biarawati usai sang kaisar meninggal, tapi ia memiliki dua putra dengan Kaisar Tang Gao Zong.

programme.title: Empress Wu
programme.desc: Wu Ze Tian adalah seorang selir Kaisar Tang yang berusia 14 tahun nan cantik dan berbakat. Ia menjadi biarawati usai sang kaisar meninggal, tapi ia memiliki dua putra dengan Kaisar Tang Gao Zong.

programme.title: Rolls, Rolls, I Love You
programme.desc: Tiga pemuda menyinggung seorang miliarder dan terlibat dalam taruhan yang tinggi. Jika menang, mereka bisa memiliki mobil Rolls Royce miliknya, tetapi mereka harus membayar lima puluh ribu dolar jika kalah!

programme.title: Love Without End
programme.desc: Penyanyi Qing Qing dan arsitek Tang Peng Nan adalah pasangan serasi. Ia mengorbankan dirinya untuk membantu Peng Nan pada saat keluarganya mengalami kesulitan. Namun, mereka putus karena kesalahpahaman.

programme.title: Pursuit Of Vengeance
programme.desc: Legenda Kung Fu Ti Lung membintangi film laga ini sebagai Fu Xue Hong, yang memulai perjalanan agar dapat membalas dendam untuk ayahnya.

programme.title: Return Of The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Film sekuel ini bercerita tentang imigran Yeh Feng yang kabur dari penjara untuk tinggal bersama paman Wang Sha yang jahat. Namun, ternyata kekasihnya, Ai Ti, telah menikah dengan seorang pria yang kasar.

programme.title: Heroes Of Sung
programme.desc: Dalam film kung fu klasik ini, Shih Zu, salah satu pahlawan wanita di perfilman laga Hong Kong, bekerjasama dengan Lo Lieh untuk menemukan dan melindungi segel kerajaan Dinasti Sung.

programme.title: Voyage Of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Kaisar Chien Lung melanjutkan penyamarannya ke Tiongkok Selatan. Ditemani oleh menteri dan sarjana kekaisaran, mereka memiliki banyak kejadian menarik di Yangzhou.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Dua pangeran berseteru memperebutkan takhta di Dinasti Qing. Bisakah wanita pembunuh yang terlibat dalam perseteruan kerajaan ini menjalankan misinya demi membantu salah satu pangeran mendapatkan takhta?

programme.title: Rose, Be My Love
programme.desc: Berlatar pada malam penyerbuan Jepang di Hong Kong, film tentang kisah cinta yang tragis produksi Shaw Brothers ini dibintangi oleh Li Ting dan Kwan Shan sebagai sepasang kekasih yang terpisahkan oleh perang.

programme.title: Gambler's Delight
programme.desc: Dalam film tentang perjudian ini, Danny Lee berperan sebagai seorang penjudi putus asa yang melakukan kecurangan saat berjudi di sebuah kasino di Makau. Ia pun harus menghadapi seorang pemimpin geng asal Jepang.

programme.title: Black Magic 2
programme.desc: Dokter Sing merasa bingung dengan gejala-gejala aneh yang dialami pasiennya dan meminta bantuan pada temannya. Penyakit tersebut rupanya disebabkan oleh ilmu hitam yang dilakukan oleh seorang pria jahat bernama Kong.

programme.title: Roving Swordsman
programme.desc: Sebuah klan jahat nan ambisius berniat untuk menguasai dunia seni bela diri. Untuk mencapai tujuan tersebut, mereka harus mencuri manuskrip seni bela diri rahasia yang menggambarkan cara membuat senjata api.

programme.title: Forbidden Tales Of Two Cities
programme.desc: Urusan asmara dan moral di era modern hanyalah segelintir masalah dari cerita yang berlatarkan Makau ini. Kisah cinta antara empat anak manusia menjadi cerita utama dalam kisah humor ini.

programme.title: Judgement Of An Assassin
programme.desc: Sebuah klan jahat merencanakan perselisihan untuk mendominasi dunia seni bela diri. Pembunuh bertopeng mereka membantai klan-klan lain dan salah satu pembunuh ditangkap dan diadili di pengadilan antarklan.

programme.title: The Singing Thief
programme.desc: Sutradara seni bela diri legendaris Chang Cheh mencoba peruntungannya dalam film musikal bersama penyanyi wanita asal Taiwan, Lin Chong, yang berperan sebagai pencuri permata yang berubah haluan menjadi penyanyi klub.

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: Putra dari keluarga kaya jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita yang hanya akan menikahinya setelah ia menjadi seorang Guru Kung-Fu. Dalam 'Drama Komedi' ini, ia menjadi pahlawan legendaris dengan berusaha menyelamatkan kaisar, dalam pencarian cintanya yang sebenarnya.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey: Cinderella
programme.desc: Kelanjutan yang berbelit-belit dari petualangan Raja Kera yang kini menjadi manusia dan melakukan perjalanan waktu, yang berupaya memenuhi takdir ilahinya.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Liang Pao-erh bergabung dengan Spinsters' Club yang riang ketika dia menemukan suaminya berselingkuh. Terlepas dari wajah bahagia yang ditampilkan oleh saudara perempuannya, di balik itu semua, masing-masing dari mereka diam-diam merindukan seorang pria dalam hidupnya.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Paman Hua adalah pensiunan agen yang memiliki toko barang antik di sebuah jalan tua. Namun, jalan itu dihancurkan secara paksa oleh Geng Naga Hijau setempat, dan membuat identitas Paman Hua tak sengaja terungkap.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Seorang fotografer terjerat oleh sesosok 'wanita berbaju merah' hingga menyebabkan kerabatnya tewas satu per satu. Ia pun bersumpah untuk mencari tahu kebenarannya saat gadis yang ia sukai juga tewas secara misterius.

programme.title: Wusong Vs Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song mengetahui perselingkuhan adik iparnya dengan pria kaya bernama Ximen Qing. Song pun dijebak dan diasingkan selama setahun oleh Qing, sementara sang adik dibunuh. Bisakah ia membalas kematian saudaranya?

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: Demi menolong putranya yang diculik oleh jaringan perdagangan manusia, petugas polisi Zhang bekerja sama dengan seorang wanita misterius guna memecahkan sindikat kejahatan internasional dan menyelamatkan putranya.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Dokumenter ini menyoroti para master Kung Fu Tiongkok yang terkenal di industri film, memamerkan warisan Kung Fu Hong Kong selama enam puluh tahun dan mengabadikan kehidupan mereka yang penuh tantangan.

programme.title: Girl With The Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: Lily, adalah seorang gadis biasa yang menjalani kehidupan sederhana. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah pasar antik, dia menemukan sepasang sepatu kaca berlian yang indah. Tanpa disangka, sepatu ini ternyata memiliki kekuatan magis yang dapat mewujudkan impian dan memberikan keberuntungan. Ketika Lily mencoba sepatu tersebut, dia segera menemukan bahwa hidupnya mulai berubah drastis. Dia mendapatkan pekerjaan impiannya, bertemu dengan orang-orang penting, dan bahkan menarik perhatian seorang pangeran modern yang tampan.

programme.title: The Bare-Footed Kid
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda tiba di kota untuk bekerja dengan teman mendiang sang ayah. Ketika toko pewarna mereka dibakar oleh seorang pemimpin geng setempat, ia memutuskan untuk melawan demi melindungi dan menyelamatkan toko.

programme.title: Oily Maniac
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda frustrasi yang menderita polio bekerja sebagai asisten hukum untuk seorang pengacara korup. Ia menerima teknik untuk mendapatkan kekuatan aneh dari seorang pria yang sekarat, yang mengubahnya menjadi pahlawan super/penjahat berbasis minyak.

programme.title: Whatever You Want
programme.desc: Anita Yuan Yung-yi berperan sebagai seorang anak perempuan yang tidak sengaja menemukan sebuah mutiara dengan jin di dalamnya. Michael Wong berperan sebagai jin yang mengabulkan tiga permintaannya.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: Seorang prajurit muda Tiongkok mencuri pedang dari seorang pendekar pedang terkenal dan kemudian melarikan diri ke dunia petualangan romantis bersama seorang pria misterius di perbatasan negara.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: Seorang pria tunanetra, You Ji Ren, bekerja di sebuah pabrik di pulau terpencil. Karena badai, pabrik itu terisolasi dan muncul sesosok monster yang membuat siapa pun berubah menjadi bayangan hitam jika melihatnya.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Seorang pengawal kekaisaran dan tiga teman masa kecilnya yang pengkhianat, yang diperintahkan untuk memburunya, secara tidak sengaja terkubur dan membeku dalam waktu. 400 tahun kemudian berlalu dan mereka dicairkan, melanjutkan pertempuran yang mereka tinggalkan.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: Serangkaian kejadian aneh terjadi di sebuah desa, di antaranya sesosok mayat yang bangkit dari kuburnya dan melarikan diri. Saat diselidiki penduduk desa, seorang penjahat meninggal dan sang kepala desa menghilang.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: Serangkaian kejadian aneh terjadi di sebuah desa, di antaranya sesosok mayat yang bangkit dari kuburnya dan melarikan diri. Saat diselidiki penduduk desa, seorang penjahat meninggal dan sang kepala desa menghilang.

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: Kepala keluarga kaya meninggal dunia dan dalam wasiatnya mewariskan kekayaannya kepada putrinya. Putranya marah dan menggunakan seorang pengumpul sampah yang mirip dengan saudara perempuannya untuk mencuri kekayaan tersebut. Putra paman juga menginginkan bagian dari kekayaan itu dan memaksa seorang pencuri kecil untuk mencuri wasiat tersebut demi rencana jahatnya.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Pergantian rezim di Leka memicu konflik di dunia hitam & putih. Polisi mengirim Zheng Zha menyusup ke geng Song Bang, tanpa tahu pihak lain sudah siap membalas dendam.

programme.title: Fight Back To School 2
programme.desc: Sing mengundurkan diri dari kepolisian setelah diturunkan pangkatnya ke bagian pengaturan lalu lintas, sementara rekannya ditugaskan dalam misi yang melibatkan teroris asing yang mengancam akan mengebom sebuah sekolah di Hong Kong, sehingga Sing memutuskan untuk membantu dengan menyamar di sekolah yang sama.

programme.title: Behind The Yellow Line
programme.desc: Seorang pria muda yang pemalu dan pekerja kantoran, bertemu dengan seorang wanita cantik dan ambisius yang sedang mengejar karirnya, serta seorang pria lain yang ramah namun penuh rahasia. Pertemuan ini membawa mereka ke dalam perjalanan emosional yang kompleks, penuh dengan kebingungan, kesalahpahaman, dan penemuan diri.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Tn. Zhang diusir dari klannya setelah tahanan Chi melarikan diri di bawah pengawasannya. Lalu, Tn. Zhang datang ke sebuah lokasi tempat hilangnya sejumlah orang dan menemukan bahwa Chi lah yang menangkap mereka.

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Chen Li Pin, putra dari pengusaha yang culun, mendapat kekecewaan usai mencari jodoh di Hawaii bersama temannya. Kemudian, secara tak sengaja mereka terjebak dalam sebuah pertukaran identitas yang kacau.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Fai, yang pernah menjadi juara dunia tinju, melarikan diri ke Makau dari rentenir dan secara tak terduga bertemu Qi, seorang pemuda yang bertekad memenangkan pertandingan tinju.

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li Tsu-liang is newly widowed and leading an impoverished life with two young sons. He attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing track, but is subsequently entangled with the loan sharks.

programme.title: God Of Gamblers 2
programme.desc: Cho yang multitalenta ingin belajar dari Dewa Judi dan menghubungi muridnya. Mereka diserang oleh seorang bos kriminal yang berencana menyalahgunakan nama baik Dewa Judi untuk menghasilkan jutaan.

programme.title: Sex Beyond The Grave
programme.desc: Seorang wanita diperkosa dan dibunuh selama Perang Dunia II. Empat puluh tahun kemudian, ia kembali untuk menghantui para penganiayanya dari Rumah Besar Tao Tao. Seorang profesor dan keluarganya pindah ke rumah itu, hanya untuk kemudian roh-roh tersebut mengambil putra mereka.

programme.title: Gangster, The Cop, The Devil
programme.desc: Detektif Lin membentuk unit khusus untuk menangkap perampok motor dan sindikat di balik aksi pencurian di Foshan usai istrinya yang hamil ditabrak oleh perampok motor.

programme.title: Open The Coffin
programme.desc: Sebuah film misteri supranatural dengan seorang detektif yang menyelidiki pembunuhan yang tampaknya merupakan akibat dari kutukan.

programme.title: Hong Kong, Hong Kong
programme.desc: Kisah tentang pengalaman imigran ilegal dari Tiongkok daratan yang berhasil sampai ke Hong Kong untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: Seorang pengusaha serakah dari Hong Kong menyewa seorang pemburu muda untuk menangkap gorila raksasa yang konon hidup jauh di dalam hutan India. Pemburu itu menemukan kera tersebut, dan hidup bersamanya ia menemukan seorang wanita liar yang telah berteman dengan makhluk itu.

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Seluruh sekolah disandera saat kompetisi pidato bahasa Inggris berlangsung. Ip Man pun memutuskan untuk bangkit dan menghadapi krisis, serta menemukan bahwa dalangnya adalah sang guru dan teman masa kecilnya.

programme.title: Love Is Love
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri miskin, Shui dan Ti, berusaha membangun kehidupan mereka sendiri. Dan melalui kerja keras mereka berdua, Shui menjadi seorang eksekutif pemasaran, kemudian sikapnya mulai berubah.

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang pemadam kebakaran yang rela menerjang bahaya dan mempertaruhkan nyawanya demi menyelamatkan orang lain. Akan tetapi, apakah ia memiliki keberanian untuk menghadapi masalah pribadinya?

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: Wong Fei-Hung adalah seorang pemuda yang nakal namun saleh, tetapi setelah serangkaian insiden, ayahnya yang frustrasi menyuruh seorang guru bela diri mabuk untuk mendisiplinkannya.

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang sopir taksi Hong Kong berubah mengerikan setelah secara tidak sengaja menabrak seorang penyihir dengan taksinya. Dia memutuskan untuk meminta bantuan penyihir tersebut untuk membalikkan kutukan kepada musuh-musuhnya dengan mengorbankan nyawanya sendiri.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembalap ingin membuktikan kelihaiannya dalam sebuah balapan, tapi ia malah melukai rekan setimnya, Lily. Dapatkah tim mereka kembali berjaya kala seorang juara balap mobil virtual bergabung di tim?

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake

programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: Mystery Road
programme.desc: Seorang detektif pribumi kembali ke pedalaman untuk menyelidiki pembunuhan seorang gadis muda.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession

programme.title: Holy Business
programme.desc: Dua bersaudara mewarisi sebuah mobil tua yang konon milik Uskup Karol Wojtyla, yang lebih dikenal sebagai Yohanes Paulus II. Mobil itu segera dianggap sebagai mukjizat, dan keduanya menganggapnya sebagai kesempatan untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik.

programme.title: An Evergreen Christmas
programme.desc: Meninggalkan kehidupan Hollywood-nya yang tampaknya glamor, Evergreen Lee terpaksa kembali ke kampung halaman kecilnya di Balsam Falls, Tennessee dan pertanian pohon Natal milik keluarganya yang pernah berkembang pesat untuk menghadiri pemakaman ayahnya.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: The Major
programme.desc: Dalam sebuah kecelakaan mobil, seorang polisi secara tidak sengaja menewaskan seorang anak. Polisi lainnya berusaha menutup-nutupi kasus ini.

programme.title: Peter Bell 2: The Czar Crown
programme.desc: Pietje Bell dituduh mencuri jam dan dipenjara, lalu kabur membuktikan dirinya tak bersalah. Ia melawan penjahat Stark dan menggagalkan rencana pencurian mahkota bersama gengnya.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: The Christmas Miracle Of...
programme.desc: Ketika seorang anak lelaki yang patah hati kehilangan harta karun kayu berharga yang menghubungkannya dengan ayahnya yang telah meninggal, ibunya yang khawatir meyakinkan seorang pemahat untuk membuat penggantinya.

programme.title: Deadly Vendetta
programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; namun, segera terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya

programme.desc: Bergabunglah bersama para murid di Stardust Space Academy saat mereka menjalani berbagai misi untuk mempelajari fakta-fakta baru sambil bersenang-senang. Ditemani karakter-karakter yang menarik dan menyenangkan, termasuk pemimpin Space Racers dan Hawk.

programme.title: Rally Caps
programme.desc: Seorang pemain bisbol muda bermimpi menjadi pemain untuk tim perjalanan Liga Kecil namun gagal karena cedera parah di lapangan.

programme.title: House Of Wonder
programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B

Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow

Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Gigi Hadid
programme.desc: Supermodel Gigi Hadid memiliki jadwal yang padat dengan penerbangan dan pemotretan. Di sela-sela perjalanannya dari New York ke LA, Gigi mengundang Vogue ke kantor IMG, tempat ia mencoba menjawab 73 Pertanyaan. Gigi menceritakan siapa idola perempuannya, memamerkan keahlian tinjunya, dan menyusun daftar lagu-lagu Taylor Swift favoritnya.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Seorang sopir bus diajak untuk tinggal bersama oleh ayah dari seorang bocah laki-laki yang ia selamatkan dari kecelakaan bus sekolah. Tak lama kemudian, si sopir menemukan berbagai kejanggalan di rumah tersebut.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: Little Pink House
programme.desc: Seorang wanita melawan kelompok yang mencoba mengusir seluruh lingkungannya dan memberikannya kepada perusahaan. Dalam keputusan akhir, Mahkamah Agung mendukung penggusuran tersebut. Perusahaan tidak pernah membangun apa pun di lokasi rumahnya yang dibongkar.

programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...
programme.desc: Bintang film *Den of Thieves*, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika?? 50 Cent menjawab semua pertanyaan ini dan masih banyak lagi!

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.
