programme.title: Iron Fist: Rebellion
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dianugerahi kemampuan bela diri yang luar biasa serta kekuatan mistis yang dikenal sebagai Iron Fist.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Bumbling Ballerina
programme.desc: Beberapa orang dewasa mengalami kesulitan mengingat masa lalu mereka sebagai anak asuh di tangan seorang monster. Nyonya Betty Thomas memanfaatkan sistem negara yang cacat, yang terus mengirimkan anak-anak tak berdosa ke rumahnya, padahal dia tidak memiliki kemampuan untuk merawat jumlah anak yang dia terima, apalagi penyiksaan yang dia lakukan terhadap mereka.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: Iron Fist: Rebellion
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dianugerahi kemampuan bela diri yang luar biasa serta kekuatan mistis yang dikenal sebagai Iron Fist.

programme.title: Deadly Daycare
programme.desc: Seorang ibu dari anak berusia tiga tahun mulai mencurigai guru penitipan anaknya telah memperlakukan anaknya dengan buruk setelah memperhatikan perubahan perilaku yang aneh pada anaknya, tetapi kebenaran yang akan dia temukan ternyata jauh lebih pribadi.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. programme.title: Ryde
programme.desc: Teknologi mendekatkan kita. Atau mungkin teknologi juga mendekatkan orang asing, terlalu dekat. Tapi seberapa besar Anda benar-benar bisa mempercayai seseorang? Dengan layanan berbagi tumpangan baru, Anda tidak pernah tahu dengan siapa Anda akan naik mobil. Atau apakah Anda akan bisa keluar dari mobil tersebut.

programme.title: The Essex Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part documentary series. Easter Sunday, 2023 - a wealthy couple in their 60s are found dead by their daughter on Mersea Island in Essex. Carol and Stephen Baxter are in their armchairs with no sign of a struggle as police rule out carbon monoxide poisoning - when Senior Investigating Officer Lydia George and her team discover a mysterious will that leaves everything to the Baxters' daughter Ellena and their family friend Luke D'Wit, the detectives find out that D'Wit was helping Carol as a carer as her health slowly deteriorated. Carol was closely following the advice of a mysterious American doctor promising to cure her thyroid condition - as a postmortem reveals that the couple had lethal levels of antihistamine and fentanyl in their systems, Ellena and Luke are arrested on suspicion of murder as detectives search for answers.

programme.title: TikTok: Murder Gone Viral
programme.desc: With exclusive access to the victims' families, friends and the police, this documentary strand explores extraordinary true crime cases linked to the world's fastest-growing social media platform. In the early hours of the 11th of February 2022, two 21-year-old men - Saqib Hussain and Hashim Ijazuddin - were found dead in a burning car on the A46 in Leicestershire. Within a short time, police arrested two unlikely culprits: 22-year-old TikTok influencer Mahek Bukhari and her 45-year-old mother Ansreen. Mahek from Stoke-on-Trent has over 160,000 followers on TikTok and many millions of views - her mum Ansreen regularly appeared in her videos. Detectives discovered that Ansreen had been in a three-year-long secret relationship with Saqib Hussain which began when he was just 18 - when she wanted to end the relationship in January 2022 and Saqib threatened to send nude photos and sex tapes to her husband, Mahek hatched a plan to silence him and enlisted others into her scheme.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Jet setters Sonia and Peter have resorted to staycations at home since having two young children, but their backyard is more of a headache than a holiday - Brian and Sarah therefore create a luxury vacation destination in their backyard that includes a pool, a spa, an outdoor kitchen and a stunning four-season structure.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern is back with the exciting and iconic gameshow as another brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker and, by opening those iconic 22 red boxes in the right order, could be in with the chance of winning a life-changing cash prize. programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Londoner Frankie is hoping to find her dream man. Which of the three single men shopping for her will impress her enough to win a date?

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. As the novelty of the chore chart wears off, Billie and Greg continue to address the kids' behaviour and debate whether to get Nelly the phone she so desperately wants with her birthday approaching - elsewhere, the family take a trip to a history museum in an attempt to show them just how lucky they are, and after turning up to Sue's house drunk, Billie and her mum decide that it's time to have an emotional heart-to-heart with Chatty.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Pete and Chloe Sims have had more awkward chats than they've had hot dinners, but they are still no closer to getting their friendship back on track - the former self-proclaimed soulmates have reached a stalemate and it's time for a third-party intervention. Pete has enlisted a therapist to help the pair navigate their issues - when all three sit down for a serious heart-to-heart, will bridges be built and will Pete and Chloe acknowledge that their feelings for one another may run deeper than they've been letting on when some shocking secrets come to light? Elsewhere, Dan and Amber have been unshakeable recently, but a spanner's been thrown in the works - it turns out that Dan confided in Demi that their relationship wasn't all rosy during lockdown... and the information is winging its way back to Amber fast. How will she react when she finds out her significant other has been voicing concerns about their relationship to none other than a Sims, and will she be able to move on?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. The second part of the fourth series reunion sees Monica break down while reflecting on her relationship with her mother and the rift between Angie and Monica grows as they disagree about the unseen events from Greek Easter - the group is then joined by Mary as she comes to Monica's defence and sheds light on where she currently stands with the rest of the women.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County

programme.title: The Floor US

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Pete and Chloe Sims drop a major bombshell in a therapy session when they admit that the lines have been blurred when it comes to their friendship - the advice they received was straightforward, take some time apart or lose the friendship, and both parties are determined to stick to it... but how will each of them cope without the other when push comes to shove, does absence really make the heart grow fonder, or is it a case of out of sight, out of mind for good? Elsewhere, Yaz and Amber have had their fair share of arguments - but they are BFFs right now as far as they're concerned and nothing's going to get in the way of that... step forward Nicole, Yaz's oldest friend who has some very strong opinions on Miss Turner and isn't afraid to share them with Yaz. Nicole thinks Amber is a fake friend who makes Yaz feel insecure - when Amber crashes their girls' spa trip, will Nicole be able to hold her tongue or will she deliver some home truths to her bestie's bestie?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Detective series, based on the novels by Caroline Graham, that follows Inspector Barnaby as he investigates murder mysteries in Middle England. When a local property developer is diagnosed with a malignant brain tumour, a few people in the picturesque village of Badger's Drift suspect that he will soon be violently murdered - it is down to DCI Barnaby and DS Troy to unearth the reasoning behind this seemingly tragic crime. Was it motivated by suppressed ill feeling within the village, or could it stem from long-buried secrets deeply rooted in the past?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in her home, the police cannot be sure a crime was even committed. With no forensic evidence and nothing to suggest the victim did not die of natural causes, officers Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin question why they were even called out. But the girl's mother is convinced that her daughter was raped, and further investigation uncovers a murder weapon and a possible suspect. Senior crown prosecutor James Steel remembers this particular suspect well - and he is positive the man is guilty. Steel pursues him with every power available to him, pushing the law to its limit. His colleagues are unsure whether his fervour is justified, and they worry that he is hounding someone who has served his time in prison and paid his debt to society. Is Steel's instinct correct or is he persecuting an innocent man?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When three people are violently murdered and a fourth left for dead in a central London shop, DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin are up against the clock as they try to find the culprit, who they fear could strike again at any time. Their search is helped by information about the unusual murder weapon - a bayonet. When the investigation comes to court, senior crown prosecutor James Steel thinks he has a fairly open and shut case. But things take an unexpected turn when he discovers that the defendant has acquired some brilliant legal support. With the case for the defence looking stronger and stronger, Steel's only hope seems to be getting the accused man to accept responsibility for his actions - but his job is made tougher because the man is delusional. Then Steel is thrown for another loop when he realises he is facing a barrister he had not bargained for on the opposing bench.

programme.desc: Mike Bradley and feisty solicitor Jackie Lambert discover they have more in common than work, while their good friend District Nurse Maggie Bolton comes to terms with life as a single mum. Gina is surprised to see an old boyfriend who has gone AWOL from the Army and Greengrass is still up to his old tricks with sidekick David, when they prepare a gourmet meal.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A flu epidemic causes havoc in Aidensfield, and Maggie is forced to make some tough decisions when baby Sam is put at risk. Greengrass plays a dangerous game when he poses as a fence.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the murder of 29-year-old Niall Coulter - with those closest to Niall intent upon obscuring the truth, it is not until the body of a drug dealer is found washed up on a Northumberland beach that the dreadful truth begins to emerge about Niall's past. While coping with revelations from her own past, Vera sifts through evidence of the grief, love and addiction that characterised Niall's life and deduces that his murderer acted through selfless and unrequited love.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A case hits close to home for DS Matt Devlin when he investigates the death of a police officer. The dead man was his best friend Sergeant Pete Garvey - whom he had known since they were boys. When Matt discovers that Pete had recently been in contact with their childhood parish priest Jonathan Nugent, he is suspicious because Pete claimed to have been sexually abused by Nugent as a boy. But with nothing but unfounded rumours to go on, a murder charge cannot be brought against the priest. Now married with a family of his own, can Matt really be sure they are after the right man? James and Alesha take an unusual approach in a desperate attempt to get the case solved.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When prison warder Charlie Tyner is found shot dead on a council estate in Hackney, it soon comes to light that, rather than having been the honest officer he appeared to be, he was corrupt and had taken advantage of his position in a number of ways. Plenty of prisoners inside had good reason for wanting him dead but, being locked up, they all have solid alibis. Crown prosecutors James Steel and Alesha Phillips find themselves at odds with their boss, George Castle, who is keen to bring the killer to justice. James and Alesha cannot help feeling that Tyner's past behaviour should be brought into consideration when charging the accused. And the pair have their eye on a much greater prize - a career criminal connected to Tyner who has evaded the justice system for too long. Can James and Alesha convince their key witness to give evidence against a man she claims to love?

programme.title: Shetland
programme.desc: Powerful murder mystery series. DI Perez's team investigate when a young man disappears on the Aberdeen to Shetland ferry crossing and a small boy ends up in intensive care. [S] S3 Ep1

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A mysterious house becomes the setting for a murder enquiry when an old woman is found dead. Greengrass encounters some scary Scousers. Craddock has a surprising announcement for Ventress.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. PC Ventress uncovers the truth behind an old adversary's return to Aidensfield. Maggie worries that a young girl is about to have an illegal abortion. Greengrass faces a race against time when he makes a promise to a dying friend.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. Dr Rachel Timoney seems well-qualified if anyone is going to be able to help the Doc change his ways, but Louisa's return further raises questions about her and Martin's relationship - meanwhile, Al welcomes his first fishing guests, but an uninvited one means that a good review is definitely not guaranteed. Elsewhere, Bert decides to try to rejuvenate trade at the restaurant by joining an online voucher scheme and offering a two-for-one lobster special with the help of local fisherman Gus.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. Martin decides to move out of the surgery and allow Louisa the space she needs - while Louisa is intrigued to meet Martin's therapist Rachel, she is less enthused when Rachel suggests that they should have therapy as a couple. Meanwhile, Janice's babysitting of James Henry does not get off to the best of starts, Bert disappears after his disastrous lobster special evening and Al is very concerned when he finds out that there are bailiffs at the restaurant, and new Portwenn radio DJ Melanie tries to involve Martin with the station's new Healthy Eating segment... and gets more than she bargained for when Martin has to perform an operation live on the air.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks and Devlin are baffled by the seemingly motiveless murder of student Archie Rahman. With little evidence to work with, the detectives find themselves at a dead end until they come across a library book that the deceased had checked out on the day of his death. Their investigation reveals that two other students also have a connection to the book. When each suspect gives the other an alibi, the detectives know that one of them is lying - but which one? After senior prosecutors Alesha Phillips and James Steel are charged with bringing the case to court, one of the perpetrators finally confesses, but claims that he acted in self defence. Steel finds that he must tread carefully and prove the case convincingly to avoid setting the guilty party free and smearing Rahman's reputation. Meanwhile, Alesha attempts to confront the demons in her past that have been thrown up by the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Stephanie Blake has been stalked for two years by a man who calls himself 'Giovanni' and who seems to know every intimate detail of her life. Over time, Giovanni's emails and calls have become more intimidating, but without an actual physical threat against her, the police can do little for Stephanie. After initial investigations go nowhere, the officers are forced to abandon the case. But then something happens which shakes the police to their very core. In the courtroom, senior Crown prosecutor James Steel faces off against defence barrister Evelyn Wyndham, but what should be a straightforward prosecution turns complicated after a major piece of evidence is excluded. Then one of the investigating officers becomes a key witness for the prosecution, raising the question of whether he is motivated by guilt. Will he perjure himself in order to get the right result?

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: The classic darts-based game show is back as host Freddie Flintoff is joined by three pairs of contestants each made up of a keen darts player (the 'thrower') and their partner (the 'knower') - the teams compete against each other by combining their skills at throwing darts at different game boards while answering questions correctly for points and prizes under the watchful eye of official scorer 'Little' Richard Ashdown. All the classic Bullseye rounds are back, including the Category Board, Pounds for Points and Bully's Prize Board, and the winning team will have a big decision to make at the end of the show - to risk everything they've won so far to try to win Bully's Mystery Star Prize. programme.title: Agent 0812
programme.desc: Sketsa komedi yang dikemas ala agen-agen detektif yang kocak dan seru

programme.title: Kisah Para Nabi
programme.desc: Menceritakan kisah para Nabi yang disampaikan oleh para dai secara ringan, sederhana, menyentuh dan relevan dengan kehidupan sekarang. Kisah dari Nabi Adam as sampai Nabi Muhammad berserta para sahabatnya.

programme.title: Break (No Secret)
programme.desc: Rumpi (No Secret) bersama Feni Rose akan membahas segala hal permasalahan artis idola ataupun selebriti Indonesia, namun dengan cara yang berbeda

programme.title: Benyamin Biang Kerok.
programme.desc: Mengetahui pemukiman warga Betawi akan digusur, Pengki, Somad dan Achie menyabotase kasino ilegal milik Said di Jakarta. Mereka menguras seluruh uang kasino untuk menebus tanah yang akan digusur

programme.title: Persahabatan Bagai Kepompong
programme.desc: Ben, siswa pindahan dari Bandung yang kerap menjadi korban perundungan. Untuk melindunginya, sang sepupu, Isabel, mengajaknya bergabung dengan geng Kepompong. Mereka menghadapi berbagai dinamika, romansa dan konflik sosial remaja

programme.title: Academy Of Pop S2
programme.desc: Perjalanan pertama Rachel sebagai anggota Now United dipenuhi dengan kegembiraan, kerja keras, dan pengalaman pertama yang tak terlupakan. Dari fitting pakaian hingga syuting MV di tempat-tempat ikonik Hong Kong.

programme.title: Vidi-O-Call
programme.desc: Video Call, salah satu cara Vidi terus berkomunikasi dengan para sahabatnya selama masa pandemi. Santai namun mendalam, membeberkan segala isu dan fakta, termasuk hal-hal sensitif dari sahabat Vidi

programme.title: Madam Rose
programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: Really Horror
programme.desc: Cak Lontong dan anak indigo Naomi Angelia Sea akan membahas dan membedah hal-hal horor dengan tema-tema yang seru. Kita akan buktikan bersama apakah itu nyata atau hanya gosip saja.

programme.title: Tulah 6/13
programme.desc: Gilang memutuskan untuk berlibur bersama Sarah dan Kevin, dua orang sahabatnya sejak SMA untuk merayakan ulang tahunnya. Rencana tersebut terganggu dengan kehadiran dua orang tamu tak diundang.

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda
programme.desc: Program Sitkom dengan Srimulat, group lawak terbesar dan terpopuler serta memiliki penggemar dari berbagai kalangan masyarakat yang menampilkan kisah-kisah lucu dan sedang menjadi topik hangat.

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S1
programme.desc: Pertarungan Angling Dharma dan Syudawirat menyebabkan Angling Dharma terluka parah. Angling Dharma terpaksa meninggalkan Malwapati beserta para pengikutnya.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans
programme.desc: Pergi berlibur ditengah masa PSBB membuat Raffi dan nagita menjadi super heboh dalam mempersiapkan segala kebutuhan liburannya demi mendapatkan liburan yang aman dan tetap nyaman

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Diary Putih Abu Abu
programme.desc: Sekelompok cewek yang bersekolah di pinggiran Jakarta bertemu dan bersahabat karena memiliki kesamaan. Keakraban mereka mulai dikenal karena konten yang sering mereka posting di social media.

programme.title: Si Doel The Movie
programme.desc: 14 tahun sudah Sarah pergi tanpa kabar & perpisahan tidak jelas. Rindu tersimpan dalam hati Doel sudah berumah tangga dengan Zaenab. Melalui Hans, Sarah meminta Doel datang ke Amsterdam bertemu dengan Dul, anak hasil pernikahannya

programme.title: CLBK The Series
programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Apose S2
programme.desc: APOSE Pindah Kantor menceritakan bagaimana Wendi memulai perjalanannya menjadi seorang podcaster yang menyaingi Surya Insomnia sebagai senior podcaster di kantor Apose yang baru

programme.title: Tiba - Tiba Berondong
programme.desc: Bella, dosen psikologi 35 tahun yang mapan namun kesepian. Di dorong dengan tekanan keluarga, ia menggunakan aplikasi kencan & bertemu Langit, pria jenaka ternyata baru 19 tahun dan menjadi mahasiswa barunya, memicu dilema asmara.

programme.title: Brata S2

programme.title: CLBK The Series
programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S2
programme.desc: Perpecahan terjadi ketika Kerajaan Malwapati yang dipimpin oleh Prabu Angling Dharma disulut oleh perseteruan dengan Syudawirat untuk memperebutkan.

programme.title: Pancaran Sinar Petromak
programme.desc: Monos, Rojali, Ade, Andra, Adit, Dindin, James & Omen adalah mahasiswa gokil, jahil tapi asyik bermusik & tergabung dalam OM Pancaran Sinar Petromaks (PSP) Mereka kompak segala urusan kecuali dalam percintaan malah dibikin taruhan

programme.title: Waalaikumsalam Paris
programme.desc: Itje, gadis asal desa Bojong, berharap hidupnya berubah drastis setelah menikah dengan pria Perancis, Clement. Begitu juga orangtua Itje selalu pamer pada tetangganya kalau Itje menikah dengan orang kaya dan akan tinggal di Paris.

programme.title: CLBK The Series
programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: Komeng electoral district
programme.desc: Sketsa Komedi yang menceritakan kelucuan Komeng dalam mewujudkan mimpinya dengan cara masuk ke lemari rahasia yang akan membawanya kemana saja dan bertemu siapa saja yang dia inginkan

programme.title: Skaya & The Big Boss
programme.desc: Skaya dan Skara adalah kembar cewek-cowok tapi beda sekolah dan karakter. Suatu ketika Skara sakit dan harus menjalani perawatan medis sehingga Skaya terpaksa harus menyamar menjadi Skara di asrama.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation

programme.title: Sincerely
programme.desc: Drama romantis yang mengikuti Fajar, seorang people pleaser yang menjadi asisten pribadi Farah, CEO perfeksionis. Fajar terjebak dilema saat ditugaskan memata-matai Farah, namun justru jatuh cinta dan terlibat konflik rumit.

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Sajadah Panjang
programme.desc: Keluarga Andhika merupakan keluarga bahagia yang penuh cinta. Namun bagaimana jika seorang ayah yang selama ini mereka banggakan, ternyata malah menyakiti hati seluruh keluarganya?

programme.title: Montage
programme.desc: Program magazine tentang movie & series review, menghadirkan para cast dan mengkombinasikan game show

programme.title: Ikatan Cinta
programme.desc: Berkisah tentang 2 bersaudara Andin dan Elsa yang tanpa sengaja mencintai pria yang sama yaitu Nino. Hubungan mereka berdua yang memang tidak pernah baik menjadi semakin buruk setelah Nino menikah dengan Andin.

programme.title: Kau & Dia
programme.desc: Zara dan Anneth, tumbuh bersahabat dan berjanji saling selalu ada dan melindungi satu sama lain. Kehadiran Naldo membuat persahabatan mereka diuji dengan pilihan cinta remaja.

programme.desc: United Archives 26/5/83. Brighton were the underdogs having finished bottom of the league. United finished third in the league and were looking for their 5th FA Cup win.

programme.desc: From 2024. A successful CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

programme.title: Assassin Club
programme.desc: From 2023. An assassin's latest mission is to kill seven people around the world, but he soon realizes that the seven targets are also skilled assassins hired to kill him.

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: From 2023. After a fantastic first date, Bea and Ben's fierce attraction suddenly turns cold. When they are unexpectedly reunited at a wedding in Australia, they end up pretending to be a couple.

programme.title: Transcendence
programme.desc: From 2014. Dr. Will Caster is the leading researcher in artificial intelligence, but his controversial experiments have earned him many enemies.

programme.title: The Sisterhood of the Traveling Pants
programme.desc: From 2005. The film is about a magical summer in the lives of four childhood friends who experience having to be apart for the first time. In a thrift store, the girls find some ola trousers that fit like a glove on all fours.

programme.title: Bombshell
programme.desc: From 2019. Inspired by the true scandal of the women who brought down the man who created the most powerful and controversial media empire of all time, Fox News.

programme.title: Coda
programme.desc: From 2021. Ruby is the only one in the family who can hear. When the family's fishing business runs into difficulties, Ruby must navigate between reefs in the sea: her enthusiasm for music, and the fear of letting her parents down.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: From 2019. The true story of a British whistleblower who leaked information to the media about an illegal NSA operation, the purpose of which was to pressure the UN Security Council to approve the invasion of Iraq in 2003.

programme.title: The Best of Me
programme.desc: From 2014. Childhood sweethearts Amanda and Dawson reunite after twenty years, when they return to their hometown to attend the funeral of an old friend.

programme.title: After We Collided
programme.desc: From 2020. In this sequel, based on the worldwide bestseller After, we follow Tessa in her painful breakup and the time afterwards. Will love overcome the past?

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: From 2020. A disabled young woman who is homeschooled begins to suspect that the treatments she receives from her mother may not be what they seem - and that her mother is hiding a dark secret from her.

programme.title: 21 and Over
programme.desc: From 2013. A promising student celebrates his 21st birthday with his two best friends the night before his big exam.

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: From 2013. A woman's life is turned upside down when she gets terrible side effects from a medicine she has been prescribed by her psychiatrist. She loses her understanding of reality and control over her life.
From 2019. The two young British soldiers, Scofield and Blake, are thrown into a seemingly impossible mission. In a race against time, they must cross enemy territory to prevent a devastating attack.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: From 2022. Otto, a grumpy, irritable and very strict widower, lives a lonely life and judges everyone he sees. As he forms an unlikely friendship with his new neighbors, Otto begins to change.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves stars in 47 Ronin, an epic fantasy where an outcast joins samurai on a quest for vengeance and honor against a ruthless overlord in ancient Japan.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Seorang taipan korup membunuh saksi kejahatan. Hanya pacar seorang pengusaha yang memiliki hubungan dengan pemerintah Tiongkok yang melihat kejadian tersebut. Pengawal dari Beijing membantu polisi Hong Kong melindunginya. Namun, ia dan saksi tersebut mulai memiliki perasaan, yang memperumit keadaan.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire Part 1

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, mulai curiga bahwa dirinya adalah mata-mata setelah mengunjungi Rekall - sebuah perusahaan yang menyediakan klien dengan memori palsu yang ditanamkan tentang kehidupan yang ingin mereka jalani - terjadi kesalahan dan dia mendapati dirinya dalam pelarian.

programme.title: Oblivion

programme.desc: Mariner, seorang pengembara misterius di Bumi pasca-apokaliptik, bertemu dengan seorang wanita dan putrinya, lalu menawarkan bantuan untuk membawa mereka ke tempat aman. Bersama-sama mereka memulai sebuah petualangan yang dapat menyelamatkan umat manusia.

programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben's gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Seorang peternak kecil setuju untuk menahan seorang penjahat yang tertangkap, yang sedang menunggu kereta untuk pergi ke pengadilan di Yuma. Pertarungan sengit pun terjadi saat penjahat itu mencoba mengelabui peternak tersebut.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Seorang terpidana pemerkosa, dibebaskan dari penjara setelah menjalani hukuman empat belas tahun, mengintai keluarga pengacara yang awalnya membelanya.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings new devastation to an already scorched landscape. With no military intervention or government help in sight, the survivors must join together in the face of despair and fight back against an unrelenting horror.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: Seorang pilot kamikaze yang dihantui rasa bersalah karena selamat berusaha menebus dosanya ketika monster raksasa yang gagal dibunuhnya berubah bentuk akibat radiasi dari uji coba bom atom dan mengepung Jepang pascaperang.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists

programme.title: The Long Way Home
programme.desc: Dua tentara, seorang warga Korea Selatan paruh baya dan seorang remaja Korea Utara, bertemu di Front Barat selama Perang Korea. Tak lama setelah perebutan sebuah tank, mereka menyadari bahwa mereka berdua adalah korban perang dan membentuk persaudaraan.

programme.title: A Man Of Reason
programme.desc: Setelah dibebaskan dari penjara, seorang pria mengetahui bahwa ia memiliki seorang putri, sehingga ia ingin meninggalkan geng dan menjalani kehidupan biasa. Namun, pemimpin baru geng tersebut merasa dikhianati.

programme.title: Cold Eyes
programme.desc: Sebuah tim polisi pengintai yang memiliki peralatan teknologi mutakhir berupaya untuk menangkap sekelompok perampok bank sadis. Dibintangi oleh Hyo-ju Han, Woo-sung Jung dan Jin Kyung.

programme.title: Abroad
programme.desc: Setelah hilangnya pacarnya, seorang warga negara asing yang bukan penutur asli bahasa Inggris menjadi tersangka utama, dan pencariannya yang putus asa untuk menemukan pacarnya berubah menjadi perjuangan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Hopeless
programme.desc: Seorang remaja ingin melarikan diri dari kampung halamannya di mana kekerasan sering terjadi di antara tetangga. Karena putus asa membutuhkan uang, ia bergabung dengan sebuah geng untuk membantu keluarganya. Hidup barunya mulai terjebak dalam situasi yang semakin berbahaya saat ia berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Dua mahasiswa dari Universitas Kepolisian Nasional Korea memutuskan untuk bekerjasama dan menyelidiki sebuah insiden penculikan.

programme.title: War Of The Arrows (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Berlatar saat invasi Manchu ke-dua di Korea, Nam Yi, yang merupakan seorang pemanah terbaik di Korea, melawan Dinasti Qing untuk menyelamatkan adik perempuannya, Ja In, yang akan diperbudak oleh penduduk Manchuria.

programme.title: Omniscient Reader: Prophecy
programme.desc: Novel favorit Dokja menjadi kenyataan yang mengerikan; dengan menggunakan pengetahuannya yang mendalam tentang kisah apokaliptik yang akan datang, pekerja kantoran itu mengubah takdirnya.

programme.title: Confidential Assignment 2
programme.desc: Detektif Korea Utara kembali untuk misi rahasia lainnya. Meski memiliki alasan yang berbeda, tiga negara bergabung untuk menjatuhkan sebuah organisasi kejahatan internasional.

programme.title: Pretty Crazy
programme.desc: Seorang calon koki kue hidup tanpa menyadari bahwa setiap malam ia berubah menjadi iblis betina yang liar. Keluarganya menyewa tetangga mereka untuk mengawasi wujud malamnya, sementara si tetangga jatuh cinta pada wujud siangnya dan berusaha mematahkan kutukannya.

programme.title: The Whistleblower
programme.desc: Sebuah drama berdasarkan pengalaman Kathryn Bolkovac, seorang polisi Nebraska yang bertugas sebagai penjaga perdamaian di Bosnia pascaperang dan keluar dari PBB karena menutupi skandal perdagangan seks.

programme.title: War of The Arrows
programme.desc: Dua kakak beradik, Nam Yi dan Ja In melarikan diri ketika desa dan keluarga mereka diserang tentara Manchu dari Dinasti Qing.13 tahun kemudian, Nam Yi tumbuh menjadi pemanah yang hebat. Sementara Ja In akan dinikahkan dengan putra keluarga Kim Mu Seon, keluarga yang merawat mereka. Namun, pembantaian terjadi dan Ja in diculik.

programme.title: Return Of The Mafia (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: 10 tahun setelah "Marrying the Mafia 1". Ketiga J mendirikan perusahaan arsitektur dan menjadi pebisnis terkenal. Mereka memegang pena alih-alih kepalan tangan di tangan mereka, tetapi hal-hal buruk masih terjadi di sekitar mereka dan sekarang bahkan mengganggu anak-anak mereka.

programme.title: Three Sisters (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Meskipun memiliki kepribadian yang berbeda, Hee-sook, seorang yang mudah khawatir, Mi-yeon, seorang yang penakut, dan Mi-ok, seorang pecandu alkohol, adalah saudara perempuan. Pada hari ulang tahun ayah mereka, ketiga saudara perempuan itu berkumpul dan memutuskan untuk mengungkit masa lalu kelam mereka.

programme.title: A Man Of Reason (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Setelah menghabiskan satu dekade di penjara, seorang pembunuh bayaran mengetahui bahwa ia memiliki seorang putri dan hanya menginginkan kesempatan untuk menjalani kehidupan normal. Namun, mantan bos mafia-nya menginginkannya kembali dengan segala cara, mengirimkan para pembunuh bayaran tanpa ampun untuk mengejarnya.

programme.title: Escape From Mogadishu
programme.desc: Anggota kedutaan Korea Utara dan Korea Selatan harus bekerja sama untuk melarikan diri dari Somalia yang dilanda perang.

programme.title: The Herd With Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: A thought-provoking, opinionated and topic-driven journey through the top sports stories of the day with host Colin Cowherd.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes explore and offer their opinions on the biggest stories in sports.

programme.title: The Herd With Colin Cowherd

programme.title: FIFA World Cup Today
programme.desc: Hosts Rob Stone and Rebecca Lowe, with analysts like Zlatan Ibrahimović, Thierry Henry, and Alexi Lalas, offer match insights and analysis.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Canada faces Qatar in a Group B match of the FIFA World Cup at BC Place Vancouver. Canada comes off a 1-1 draw behind a 78th-minute Cyle Larin goal, while Swiss player Miro Muheim scored a 94th-minute own goal to give Qatar a 1-1 draw.

programme.title: Toilet: Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: Keshav jatuh cinta pada Jaya dan menikah dengannya. Namun, sang istri mengeluh karena tidak ada toilet di rumahnya. Keshav pun berusaha menenangkannya dengan beberapa perjanjian sementara.

programme.title: Judgementall Hai Kya
programme.desc: Seorang pengisi suara bernama Bobby yang dihantui oleh suatu trauma masa kecil menyewakan sebagian rumahnya kepada Keshav dan Rima. Namun, ia sering memata-matai mereka karena merasa curiga terhadap Keshav.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Opel record racing car, called the 'Black Widow'. Built as an unofficial secret project, the limousine converted from an honest man to an arsonist caused a sensation on the race track in the late 1960s. Well-known drivers such as Erich Bitter and Niki Lauda achieved numerous successes with the 180 hp Rüsselsheimer. Then the race car mysteriously disappeared. Now the Black Widow is back and Motorvision was there for the first rollout on the racetrack. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: With the E-Tron S, Audi is expanding its fleet of electric drive vehicles and at the same time delivering a high-performance Sportback model. Also: the Brandlhof near Salzburg is one of the largest off-road parks in Europe. Toyota offers something very special there: a driving school where SUV and off-road vehicle drivers can sharpen their off-road skills away from the asphalt. And: the third generation of the Porsche Panamera. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the car of reason, it is not exciting, but it is the mega seller: the VW Golf, the most successful car in Europe, sold 30 million times. The Golf is mass compatible, classless and it dominates the compact car class. Because of its success, it has long been called the golf class. The models from the I series have long been cult, especially the legendary Golf Gti and the Golf convertible. Car History tells the story of the Golf generation and explains the secret of its success. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: The Air Show in Montabaur - At this year's airfield festival, daring pilots gather in their rare aircraft to show what can be conjured up in the sky in unique air shows (channel information).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Cars from Asia are successful worldwide and there is an enormous variety. For example the Subaru BRZ. With 234 hp and incredible handling, it offers adrenaline rushes at a low price. The Mitsubishi Colt has been a bestseller since the 1980s. Now the seventh generation follows. How good is it compared to the competition? (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: Fresh air driving fun on two and three wheels
programme.desc: Two or three wheels? No matter. What counts is the fun in the open air. And there are new models on the market for this. Like the CFMOTO 700 CL-X Heritage. Has China struck the perfect balance between price and quality with this motorcycle? Why always two-wheelers? The Can-Am Ryker offers adrenaline-pumping driving fun without the need for a motorcycle license. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by the industrial park at the Nürburgring. Headquarters of Phoenix Racing GmbH. From here, the team of Swabia-born Ernst Moser shakes up the world's race tracks. The founding members' obsession with starting their own racing team turned into a successful company in just a few years. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The new Bentley Continental GT. It is the successful model of the English luxury brand. Nevertheless, the British have been making losses in recent years. The new car must be a success in order to return Bentley to its former strength. This makes the development of the new Continental a particularly large, mammoth task. Made in England shows the development of the new GT and whether the luxury athlete also convinces racing legend Derek Bell. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sustainability in mobility 1: Optimized combustion engines
programme.desc: Combustion engines have ensured our progress for 125 years. With the price of harmful emissions. In addition, the world population continues to grow and more and more cars are being sold. But this will only work for our earth/environment in the long term if vehicle emissions are drastically reduced at the same time. Green Wave – Sustainability in mobility shows developments as to how manufacturers want to further reduce the consumption of their vehicles in the future. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most exciting cars in the world and arouse more desire than any other vehicle, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls Royce. With their extraordinary design and powerful engines, coupes arouse more emotions than any other car; they are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction. Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking dream coupes in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It is the "Holy Grail" for Porsche fans and the first Porsche to ever bear the famous name of the design genius from Austria: The Type 64, a racing car from 1938 that is based on the Volkswagen developed by Professor Ferdinand Porsche. Only two of the streamlined cars were built and were intended to take part in a race from Berlin to Rome. But the war intervened... (channel info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: After more than 70 years, Land Rover presents a new edition of the classic Defender off-road vehicle. Also: the world record attempt in drifting in the Porsche Taycan at the Hockenheimring. And: the Porsche 911 Turbo and the 718 Spyder in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The 60s and 70s – the golden years for Opel. The traditional brand is at its best. Ascona, Manta, Rekord and GT: Opel is more than just a car, Opel is an attitude to life. Opel is colorful, fashionable, exciting - and builds one classic after another. Today they are all cult. Car History shows the heyday of Opel. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: And only here does the largest motorsport spectacle in the world take place. 210 racing cars, more than 1,000 drivers and helpers, plus over 200,000 fans. The 24 hour race leaves no one indifferent. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: What is the correct name? The boat, the boat or the boat? Well, today it's the Boot for once, because we're making a little trip to Düsseldorf with Motorvision on Tour and that's where the Boot is taking place and that's the world's largest yacht and water sports trade fair in the entire world. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Size matters! At least many families will agree. With the BMW XM, M GmbH is presenting itself with a true colossus for families with certain demands for its 50th birthday. The fully electric KIA EV9 is significantly quieter, but visually similarly brutal. In the family check we find out whether it is perhaps the best electric car for large families. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. 5.7 liter displacement, 345 hp, 6 seconds from zero to one hundred and a top speed of 274 km/h - the Corvette C5 was the most brutal monster on America's roads at the time. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Mercedes house tuner AMG is once again starting a star war. At least when it comes to horsepower. The C 63 AMG, E 63 S AMG and the S 63 AMG outperform each other in terms of performance data. AMG actually stands for Aufrecht, Melcher and Großsasbach, i.e. the names of the founders and the place where they were founded, but AMG could also stand for absolute motor enjoyment. Because the AMG stars all offer that. Large-volume, bassy, ​​rumbling high-performance drives. You can still tell today that the vehicles have their origins in motorsport. And this success story continues to be written today. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: On the Stunt Heroes highway, a skidding truck competes against a remote-controlled Chrysler. Stunt coordinator Domanski's goal: to take off the roof of the Chrysler. If everything goes according to plan, the stunt will result in a new convertible! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In Seefeld in Tyrol, the Swiss Spirit magazine welcomes a group of readers to the Spirit Driving Days. The participants set off with a young or vintage car and experience a route that is around 230 kilometers long, the highlight of which is the unique Engalm - a natural jewel with over 2,000 maple trees that are on average 500 years old. The teams are accommodated in the majestic and romantic, 500-year-old five-star monastery hotel Klosterbräu. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Below zero temperatures, lots of snow and cold hands. But that doesn't mean that driving fun is neglected. With the right driving machines, that's no problem: the 550 hp all-wheel drive monster Nissan GT-R has to prove its winter suitability and the new Porsche 911 with a turbo engine finds its limit in Finnish Lapland. Hot boxes on the rocks – in supercars. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: But electric cars are not conquering the world everywhere. Europe is partly lagging behind the trend, which is why attractive vehicles are in demand. With the EV3, Kia is launching a new compact SUV at an affordable price. The EV6 also receives an update. We test both in Portugal. And: Europe's cheapest electric car is also getting an upgrade. We reveal five exciting facts about the Dacia Spring. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.sub-title: All-wheel drive fun on and off-road
programme.desc: All-wheel drive is only fun off-road? Absolutely not! And these two are proof: The Subaru Forester is taking off in its new sixth generation. We check its qualities on and off-road and find out the secret of its success. And this all-wheel drive stunner is probably one of the most extraordinary electric cars. Five exciting facts and a bonus about the Hyundai Ioniq 5 N. (channel information) await you.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: New Zealand Jetsprint Championship
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: Motorboating: F1H2O World Championship
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship
programme.sub-title: GP of Qatar, Runabout & Freestyle, Old Doha Port
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike Class Pro World Championship starts a new action-packed season. The registered pilots promise exciting races on the water again this year. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It is the "Holy Grail" for Porsche fans and the first Porsche to ever bear the famous name of the design genius from Austria: The Type 64, a racing car from 1938 that is based on the Volkswagen developed by Professor Ferdinand Porsche. Opel is colorful, fashionable, exciting - and builds one classic after another. Today they are all cult. Car History shows the heyday of Opel. (Station info).

programme.desc: And only here does the largest motorsport spectacle in the world take place. 210 racing cars, more than 1,000 drivers and helpers, plus over 200,000 fans. The 24 hour race leaves no one indifferent. (Station info).
